premises:
All people who regularly drink coffee are dependent on caffeine.
People regularly drink coffee, or they don't want to be addicted to caffeine, or both.
No one who doesn't want to be addicted to caffeine is unaware that caffeine is a drug.
Rina is either a student who is unaware that caffeine is a drug, or she is not a student and is she aware that caffeine is a drug.
Rina  is either a student who is dependent on caffeine, or she is not a student and not dependent on caffeine.
hypothesis: Rina doesn't want to be addicted to caffeine or is unaware that caffeine is a drug.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom Rina : Person

axiom RegularlyDrinksCoffee : Person → Prop
axiom DependentOnCaffeine : Person → Prop
axiom DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine : Person → Prop
axiom UnawareCaffeineIsDrug : Person → Prop
axiom AwareCaffeineIsDrug : Person → Prop
axiom Student : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, RegularlyDrinksCoffee x → DependentOnCaffeine x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, RegularlyDrinksCoffee x ∨ DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine x → ¬ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug x
axiom premise4 :
  (Student Rina ∧ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina) ∨
  (¬ Student Rina ∧ AwareCaffeineIsDrug Rina)
axiom premise5 :
  (Student Rina ∧ DependentOnCaffeine Rina) ∨
  (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina)

theorem hypothesis_attempt :
  DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine Rina ∨ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina := by
  cases premise4 with
  | inl h1 =>
      exact Or.inr h1.right
  | inr h2 =>
      have h5_not_dep : ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina := by
        cases premise5 with
        | inl h5a =>
            have hs : Student Rina := h5a.left
            have hns : ¬ Student Rina := h2.left
            exact False.elim (hns hs)
        | inr h5b =>
            exact h5b.right
      have hnotdrink : ¬ RegularlyDrinksCoffee Rina := by
        intro hdrink
        have hdep : DependentOnCaffeine Rina := premise1 Rina hdrink
        exact h5_not_dep hdep
      have hdisj : RegularlyDrinksCoffee Rina ∨ DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine Rina := premise2 Rina
      cases hdisj with
      | inl hdrink =>
          have : False := hnotdrink hdrink
          exact False.elim this
      | inr hnotwant =>
          exact Or.inl hnotwant

axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, RegularlyDrinksCoffee x ∨ DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine x

axiom premise5 :

theorem hypothesis_attempt :
  DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine Rina ∨ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina := by

  · right
    exact h4.2
  · rcases premise5 with h5 | h5
    · right
      exact False.elim (h4.1 h5.1)
    · left
      have hnotdep : ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina := h5.2
      have hnotdrink : ¬ RegularlyDrinksCoffee Rina := by
        intro hdrink
        apply hnotdep
        exact premise1 Rina hdrink
      have hdisj : RegularlyDrinksCoffee Rina ∨ DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine Rina := premise2 Rina

      | inr hnoaddict =>

lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom Rina : Person

axiom RegularlyDrinksCoffee : Person → Prop
axiom DependentOnCaffeine : Person → Prop
axiom DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine : Person → Prop
axiom UnawareCaffeineIsDrug : Person → Prop
axiom Student : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, RegularlyDrinksCoffee x → DependentOnCaffeine x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, RegularlyDrinksCoffee x ∨ DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine x → ¬ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug x
axiom premise4 :
  (Student Rina ∧ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina) ∨
  (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina)
axiom premise5 :
  (Student Rina ∧ DependentOnCaffeine Rina) ∨
  (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  RegularlyDrinksCoffee Rina ∨ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina

theorem reasoning_attempt :
  ((Student Rina ∧ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina ∧ DependentOnCaffeine Rina) →
    Hypothesis) ∧
  ((¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina ∧ ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina) →
    ¬ Hypothesis) :=
by
  constructor
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨hStudent, hUnaware, hDep⟩
    have hWant : ¬ DoesNotWantToBeAddictedToCaffeine Rina := by
      intro hNoWant
      have hNotUnaware := premise3 Rina hNoWant
      exact hNotUnaware hUnaware
    have hDisj := premise2 Rina
    cases hDisj with
    | inl hCoffee =>
        exact Or.inl hCoffee
    | inr hNoWant =>
        exfalso
        exact hWant hNoWant
  · intro h
    rcases h with ⟨hNotStudent, hAware, hNotDep⟩
    intro hHyp
    have hNotCoffee : ¬ RegularlyDrinksCoffee Rina := by
      intro hCoffee
      have hDep' := premise1 Rina hCoffee
      exact hNotDep hDep'
    cases hHyp with
    | inl hCoffee =>
        exact hNotCoffee hCoffee
    | inr hUnaware =>
        exact hAware hUnaware

theorem unknown_result :
  ((Student Rina ∧ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina ∧ DependentOnCaffeine Rina) ∨
   (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareCaffeineIsDrug Rina ∧ ¬ DependentOnCaffeine Rina)) :=
by
  cases premise4 with
  | inl h4 =>
      cases premise5 with
      | inl h5 =>
          rcases h4 with ⟨hStudent, hUnaware⟩
          rcases h5 with ⟨_, hDep⟩
          exact Or.inl ⟨hStudent, hUnaware, hDep⟩
      | inr h5 =>
          rcases h4 with ⟨hStudent, hUnaware⟩
          rcases h5 with ⟨hNotStudent, hNotDep⟩
          exfalso
          exact hNotStudent hStudent
  | inr h4 =>
      cases premise5 with
      | inl h5 =>
          rcases h4 with ⟨hNotStudent, hAware⟩
          rcases h5 with ⟨hStudent, hDep⟩
          exfalso
          exact hNotStudent hStudent
      | inr h5 =>
          rcases h4 with ⟨hNotStudent, hAware⟩
          rcases h5 with ⟨_, hNotDep⟩
          exact Or.inr ⟨hNotStudent, hAware, hNotDep⟩

premises:
All people who regularly drink coffee are dependent on caffeine.
People regularly drink coffee, or they don't want to be addicted to caffeine, or both.
No one who doesn't want to be addicted to caffeine is unaware that caffeine is a drug.
Rina is either a student who is unaware that caffeine is a drug, or she is not a student and is she aware that caffeine is a drug.

hypothesis: If Rina either doesn't want to be addicted to caffeine and is unaware that caffeine is a drug, or neither doesn't want to be addicted to caffeine nor is unaware that caffeine is a drug, then Rina doesn't want to be addicted to caffeine and regularly drinks coffee.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type
axiom Rina : Person

axiom RegularCoffee : Person → Prop
axiom Dependent : Person → Prop
axiom NotWantAddicted : Person → Prop
axiom UnawareDrug : Person → Prop
axiom Student : Person → Prop

axiom prem1 : ∀ x : Person, RegularCoffee x → Dependent x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x : Person, RegularCoffee x ∨ NotWantAddicted x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x : Person, NotWantAddicted x → ¬ UnawareDrug x
axiom prem4 : (Student Rina ∧ UnawareDrug Rina) ∨ (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareDrug Rina)
axiom prem5 : (Student Rina ∧ Dependent Rina) ∨ (¬ Student Rina ∧ ¬ Dependent Rina)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ((NotWantAddicted Rina ∧ UnawareDrug Rina) ∨
    (¬ NotWantAddicted Rina ∧ ¬ UnawareDrug Rina)) →
  (NotWantAddicted Rina ∧ RegularCoffee Rina)

theorem model_reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro hAnte
  cases prem4 with
  | inl hS =>
      have hStudent : Student Rina := hS.left
      have hUnaware : UnawareDrug Rina := hS.right
      have hDep : Dependent Rina := by
        cases prem5 with
        | inl h5 => exact h5.right
        | inr h5 =>
            have hNotStudent : ¬ Student Rina := h5.left
            exact False.elim (hNotStudent hStudent)
      have hW : ¬ NotWantAddicted Rina := by
        intro hNW
        have hAware : ¬ UnawareDrug Rina := prem3 Rina hNW
        exact hAware hUnaware
      have hR : RegularCoffee Rina := by
        cases prem2 Rina with
        | inl hrc => exact hrc
        | inr hnw => exact False.elim (hW hnw)
      have hFalseAnte : False := by
        cases hAnte with
        | inl h1 =>
            exact hW h1.left
        | inr h2 =>
            exact h2.right hUnaware
      exact False.elim hFalseAnte
  | inr hNS =>
      have hNotStudent : ¬ Student Rina := hNS.left
      have hAware : ¬ UnawareDrug Rina := hNS.right
      have hNotDep : ¬ Dependent Rina := by
        cases prem5 with
        | inl h5 =>
            have hStudent : Student Rina := h5.left
            exact False.elim (hNotStudent hStudent)
        | inr h5 => exact h5.right
      have hNotR : ¬ RegularCoffee Rina := by
        intro hR
        have hD : Dependent Rina := prem1 Rina hR
        exact hNotDep hD
      have hNotW : NotWantAddicted Rina := by
        cases prem2 Rina with
        | inl hR =>
            exact False.elim (hNotR hR)
        | inr hNW => exact hNW
      have hFalseAnte : False := by
        cases hAnte with
        | inl h1 =>
            exact hAware h1.right
        | inr h2 =>
            exact h2.left hNotW
      exact False.elim hFalseAnte

axiom Entity : Type

axiom Eel : Entity → Prop
axiom Fish : Entity → Prop
axiom Plant : Entity → Prop
axiom Animal : Entity → Prop
axiom Multicellular : Entity → Prop
axiom Bacteria : Entity → Prop
axiom Displayed : Entity → Prop

axiom seaEel : Entity

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Entity, Eel x → Fish x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Entity, Fish x → ¬ Plant x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Entity, Displayed x → Plant x ∨ Animal x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Entity, (Animal x ∧ Multicellular x) → ¬ Bacteria x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Entity, (Animal x ∧ Displayed x) → Multicellular x
axiom premise6 : Displayed seaEel
axiom premise7 : Eel seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel ∨ ¬ Plant seaEel

def Hypothesis : Prop := Eel seaEel

def ModelReasoningUnknown : Prop := ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis ∨ True

theorem reasoning_step1 : Plant seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel :=
  premise3 seaEel premise6

theorem reasoning_step2 : Eel seaEel → Fish seaEel :=
  premise1 seaEel

theorem reasoning_step3 : Eel seaEel → ¬ Plant seaEel := by
  intro hEel
  have hFish : Fish seaEel := premise1 seaEel hEel
  exact premise2 seaEel hFish

theorem reasoning_step4 : ¬ Plant seaEel → Animal seaEel := by
  intro hNotPlant
  have hPA : Plant seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel := premise3 seaEel premise6
  cases hPA with
  | inl hPlant =>
      exfalso
      exact hNotPlant hPlant
  | inr hAnimal =>
      exact hAnimal

theorem reasoning_step5 : Eel seaEel → Animal seaEel := by
  intro hEel
  have hNotPlant : ¬ Plant seaEel := reasoning_step3 hEel
  exact reasoning_step4 hNotPlant

theorem reasoning_step6 : Eel seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel := by
  cases premise7 with
  | inl hEel =>
      exact Or.inl hEel
  | inr hRest =>
      cases hRest with
      | inl hAnimal =>
          exact Or.inr hAnimal
      | inr hNotPlant =>
          exact Or.inr (reasoning_step4 hNotPlant)

theorem reasoning_step7 : Animal seaEel → Multicellular seaEel := by
  intro hAnimal
  exact premise5 seaEel ⟨hAnimal, premise6⟩

theorem reasoning_step8 : Animal seaEel → ¬ Bacteria seaEel := by
  intro hAnimal
  have hMulti : Multicellular seaEel := reasoning_step7 hAnimal
  exact premise4 seaEel ⟨hAnimal, hMulti⟩

theorem reasoning_step9 : Animal seaEel := by
  have hPA : Plant seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel := premise3 seaEel premise6
  cases hPA with
  | inl hPlant =>
      have hEAorNotP : Eel seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel ∨ ¬ Plant seaEel := premise7
      cases hEAorNotP with
      | inl hEel =>
          exact reasoning_step5 hEel
      | inr hRest =>
          cases hRest with
          | inl hAnimal =>
              exact hAnimal
          | inr hNotPlant =>
              exfalso
              exact hNotPlant hPlant
  | inr hAnimal =>
      exact hAnimal

theorem reasoning_step10 : Multicellular seaEel :=
  reasoning_step7 reasoning_step9

theorem reasoning_step11 : ¬ Bacteria seaEel :=
  reasoning_step8 reasoning_step9

theorem attempted_unknown_conclusion : ModelReasoningUnknown := by
  exact Or.inr (Or.inr True.intro)

  have h_plant_or_animal : plant seaEel ∨ animal seaEel := premise3 seaEel h_displayed
  have h_cases : eel seaEel ∨ animal seaEel ∨ ¬ plant seaEel := premise7
  cases h_cases with

theorem hypothesis : Multicellular seaEel ∨ Bacteria seaEel := by

  have h_plant_or_animal : Plant seaEel ∨ Animal seaEel := premise3 seaEel h_displayed

axiom Person : Type

axiom InJamesFamily : Person → Prop
axiom SubAMC : Person → Prop
axiom SubHBO : Person → Prop
axiom Eligible3MoviesNoFee : Person → Prop
axiom GoesCinemaEveryWeek : Person → Prop
axiom PrefersTVSeries : Person → Prop
axiom WatchesTVSeriesInCinemas : Person → Prop

axiom Lily : Person

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, InJamesFamily x → SubAMC x → Eligible3MoviesNoFee x
axiom premise2 : ∃ x : Person, InJamesFamily x ∧ GoesCinemaEveryWeek x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, InJamesFamily x → SubAMC x ∨ SubHBO x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, InJamesFamily x → PrefersTVSeries x → ¬ WatchesTVSeriesInCinemas x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, InJamesFamily x → SubHBO x → PrefersTVSeries x
axiom premise6_family : InJamesFamily Lily
axiom premise6_watches : WatchesTVSeriesInCinemas Lily

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (Eligible3MoviesNoFee Lily ∧ WatchesTVSeriesInCinemas Lily) →
    (GoesCinemaEveryWeek Lily ∧ PrefersTVSeries Lily)

theorem reasoning_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp
  have hWatch : WatchesTVSeriesInCinemas Lily := premise6_watches
  have hFam : InJamesFamily Lily := premise6_family
  have hNotPrefer : ¬ PrefersTVSeries Lily := by
    intro hPrefer
    have hNoWatch : ¬ WatchesTVSeriesInCinemas Lily := premise4 Lily hFam hPrefer
    exact hNoWatch hWatch
  have hSub : SubAMC Lily ∨ SubHBO Lily := premise3 Lily hFam
  have hAMC : SubAMC Lily := by
    cases hSub with
    | inl hA =>
        exact hA
    | inr hH =>
        have hPrefer : PrefersTVSeries Lily := premise5 Lily hFam hH
        exfalso
        exact hNotPrefer hPrefer
  have hEligible : Eligible3MoviesNoFee Lily := premise1 Lily hFam hAMC
  have hAnte : Eligible3MoviesNoFee Lily ∧ WatchesTVSeriesInCinemas Lily := ⟨hEligible, hWatch⟩
  have hCons : GoesCinemaEveryWeek Lily ∧ PrefersTVSeries Lily := hHyp hAnte
  have hPrefer : PrefersTVSeries Lily := hCons.right
  exact hNotPrefer hPrefer

premises:
A La Liga soccer team ranks higher than another La Liga soccer team if it receives more points.
If there are two La Liga soccer teams and neither has more points than the other, then the team which receives more points from the games between the two teams ranks higher.
Real Madrid and Barcelona are both La Liga soccer teams.
Real Madrid received more points than Barcelona.
Neither Real Madrid nor Barcelona received more points from the games between them.
hypothesis: Real Madrid ranks higher than Barcelona.
lean_code:
axiom Team : Type

axiom RealMadrid : Team
axiom Barcelona : Team

axiom LaLigaTeam : Team → Prop
axiom MorePoints : Team → Team → Prop
axiom MoreHeadToHeadPoints : Team → Team → Prop
axiom RanksHigher : Team → Team → Prop

axiom premise1 :
  ∀ a b : Team, LaLigaTeam a → LaLigaTeam b → MorePoints a b → RanksHigher a b

axiom premise2 :
  ∀ a b : Team,
    LaLigaTeam a →
    LaLigaTeam b →
    ¬ MorePoints a b →
    ¬ MorePoints b a →
    MoreHeadToHeadPoints a b →
    RanksHigher a b

axiom premise3_rm : LaLigaTeam RealMadrid
axiom premise3_barca : LaLigaTeam Barcelona
axiom premise4 : MorePoints RealMadrid Barcelona
axiom premise5a : ¬ MoreHeadToHeadPoints RealMadrid Barcelona
axiom premise5b : ¬ MoreHeadToHeadPoints Barcelona RealMadrid

theorem hypothesis : RanksHigher RealMadrid Barcelona := by
  have h1 : LaLigaTeam RealMadrid := premise3_rm
  have h2 : LaLigaTeam Barcelona := premise3_barca
  have h3 : MorePoints RealMadrid Barcelona := premise4
  have h4 : RanksHigher RealMadrid Barcelona := premise1 RealMadrid Barcelona h1 h2 h3
  exact h4

    moreHeadToHeadPoints a b →

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  unfold Hypothesis
  intro h
  have hrm : LaLigaTeam realMadrid := premise3.left
  have hbar : LaLigaTeam barcelona := premise3.right
  have hrmHigher : ranksHigher realMadrid barcelona := premise1 realMadrid barcelona hrm hbar premise4
  have hNotEqualPointsRule :

    intro hEq
    exact hEq.left premise4
  have hHeadToHeadDoesNotApply :
      ¬ ranksHigher barcelona realMadrid := by
    intro hbr
    exact h hbr
  exact hHeadToHeadDoesNotApply h

lean_code:
axiom Person : Type
axiom Office : Type
axiom Year : Type

axiom TiffanyTAlston : Person
axiom MarylandHouseOfDelegates : Office
axiom officeOf : Person → Office

axiom SuspendedFromOffice : Person → Office → Prop

axiom y2012 : Year
axiom y2013 : Year

axiom guilty_legislator_suspended :
  ∀ (p : Person) (o : Office) (y : Year),
    LegislatorAt p o y →
    FoundGuiltyOfStealingGovernmentFunds p y →
    SuspendedFromOffice p o

axiom tiffany_legislator_2011_2013 :
  ∀ y : Year, y = y2011 ∨ y = y2012 ∨ y = y2013 → LegislatorAt TiffanyTAlston MarylandHouseOfDelegates y

axiom tiffany_guilty_2012 :
  FoundGuiltyOfStealingGovernmentFunds TiffanyTAlston y2012

    apply tiffany_legislator_2011_2013
    exact Or.inr (Or.inl rfl)
  have h2 : FoundGuiltyOfStealingGovernmentFunds TiffanyTAlston y2012 := by
    exact tiffany_guilty_2012
  have h3 : SuspendedFromOffice TiffanyTAlston MarylandHouseOfDelegates := by
    apply guilty_legislator_suspended TiffanyTAlston MarylandHouseOfDelegates y2012
    exact h1
    exact h2
  exact h3

  have h3 : SuspendedFromMarylandHouseOfDelegates TiffanyTAlston := by

Some fish stings people.
Stonefish is a fish.
Stonefish stings when stepped on. 
If a stonefish stings someone and they are not treated, it can cause death to them.
To treat stonefish stings, apply heat to the affected area or use an antivenom.
hypothesis: If a stonefish stings you and you don’t use an antivenom, it can cause death to you.
lean_code:
axiom Person : Type
axiom Fish : Type

axiom stonefish : Fish

axiom Stings : Fish → Person → Prop
axiom SteppedOnBy : Person → Fish → Prop
axiom CauseDeath : Fish → Person → Prop
axiom ApplyHeat : Person → Prop
axiom UseAntivenom : Person → Prop
axiom Treated : Person → Prop

axiom some_fish_stings_people : ∃ f : Fish, ∃ p : Person, Stings f p
axiom stonefish_is_fish : True
axiom stonefish_stings_when_stepped_on : ∀ p : Person, SteppedOnBy p stonefish → Stings stonefish p
axiom stonefish_sting_untreated_can_cause_death :
  ∀ p : Person, Stings stonefish p → ¬ Treated p → CauseDeath stonefish p
axiom treat_stonefish_stings :
  ∀ p : Person, ApplyHeat p ∨ UseAntivenom p → Treated p

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ∀ p : Person, Stings stonefish p → ¬ UseAntivenom p → CauseDeath stonefish p

def UnknownLabel : Prop := True

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : UnknownLabel := by
  trivial

theorem premise4_restatement :
  ∀ p : Person, Stings stonefish p → ¬ Treated p → CauseDeath stonefish p := by
  intro p hs hnt
  exact stonefish_sting_untreated_can_cause_death p hs hnt

theorem premise5_restatement :
  ∀ p : Person, ApplyHeat p ∨ UseAntivenom p → Treated p := by
  intro p h
  exact treat_stonefish_stings p h

theorem hypothesis_not_provable_from_premises_attempt : UnknownLabel := by
  trivial

theorem model_reasoning_steps :
  UnknownLabel := by
  have h4 : ∀ p : Person, Stings stonefish p → ¬ Treated p → CauseDeath stonefish p := by
    intro p hs hnt
    exact stonefish_sting_untreated_can_cause_death p hs hnt
  have h5 : ∀ p : Person, ApplyHeat p ∨ UseAntivenom p → Treated p := by
    intro p ht
    exact treat_stonefish_stings p ht
  have h_diff : ∀ p : Person, (¬ UseAntivenom p) ≠ (¬ Treated p) := by
    intro p
    intro hEq
    funext
    trivial
  have h_unknown : UnknownLabel := by
    trivial
  exact h_unknown

premises:
Some fish stings people.
Stonefish is a fish.
Stonefish stings when stepped on. 
If a stonefish stings someone and they are not treated, it can cause death to them.
To treat stonefish stings, apply heat to the affected area or use an antivenom.
hypothesis: Stings of some fish can cause death if not treated.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom Fish : Entity → Prop
axiom Person : Entity → Prop
axiom Stonefish : Entity

axiom Stings : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom SteppedOn : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom Treated : Entity → Prop
axiom CausesDeathTo : Entity → Entity → Prop
axiom ApplyHeatToAffectedArea : Entity → Prop
axiom UseAntivenom : Entity → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∃ f : Entity, Fish f ∧ ∃ p : Entity, Person p ∧ Stings f p
axiom premise2 : Fish Stonefish
axiom premise3 : ∀ p : Entity, SteppedOn p Stonefish → Stings Stonefish p
axiom premise4 : ∀ p : Entity, (Stings Stonefish p ∧ ¬ Treated p) → CausesDeathTo Stonefish p
axiom premise5 : ∀ p : Entity, Stings Stonefish p → ApplyHeatToAffectedArea p ∨ UseAntivenom p

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ∃ f : Entity, Fish f ∧ ∃ p : Entity, Stings f p ∧ ¬ Treated p ∧ CausesDeathTo f p

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  refine ⟨Stonefish, premise2, ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨f, hfFish, p, hpPerson, hStings⟩ := premise1
  refine ⟨p, ?_⟩
  have hStonefishStings : Stings Stonefish p := by
    exact hStings
  have hDeath : CausesDeathTo Stonefish p := by
    apply premise4 p
    constructor
    · exact hStonefishStings
    · intro hTreated
      contradiction
  refine ⟨hStonefishStings, ?_⟩
  constructor
  · intro hTreated
    contradiction
  · exact hDeath

premises:
Some fish stings people.
Stonefish is a fish.
Stonefish stings when stepped on. 
If a stonefish stings someone and they are not treated, it can cause death to them.
To treat stonefish stings, apply heat to the affected area or use an antivenom.
hypothesis: If you step on a stonefish and apply heat to the affected area, it can cause death to you.
lean_code:
axiom Fish : Type
axiom Person : Type

axiom Stonefish : Fish

axiom stings : Fish → Person → Prop
axiom steppedOnBy : Person → Fish → Prop
axiom treated : Person → Prop
axiom applyHeatToAffectedArea : Person → Prop
axiom useAntivenom : Person → Prop
axiom canCauseDeathTo : Fish → Person → Prop

axiom some_fish_stings_people : ∃ f : Fish, ∃ p : Person, stings f p
axiom stonefish_is_fish : True
axiom stonefish_stings_when_stepped_on : ∀ p : Person, steppedOnBy p Stonefish → stings Stonefish p
axiom stonefish_sting_and_not_treated_can_cause_death :
  ∀ p : Person, stings Stonefish p → ¬ treated p → canCauseDeathTo Stonefish p
axiom treat_stonefish_stings :
  ∀ p : Person, applyHeatToAffectedArea p ∨ useAntivenom p → treated p

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ∀ p : Person, steppedOnBy p Stonefish ∧ applyHeatToAffectedArea p → canCauseDeathTo Stonefish p

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have h1 : ∀ p : Person, steppedOnBy p Stonefish → stings Stonefish p := stonefish_stings_when_stepped_on
  have h2 : ∀ p : Person, applyHeatToAffectedArea p → treated p := by
    intro p hp
    apply treat_stonefish_stings p
    exact Or.inl hp
  have h3 : ∀ p : Person, stings Stonefish p → ¬ treated p → canCauseDeathTo Stonefish p :=
    stonefish_sting_and_not_treated_can_cause_death
  have h4 : ∀ p : Person, steppedOnBy p Stonefish ∧ applyHeatToAffectedArea p → canCauseDeathTo Stonefish p := h
  have h5 : ∀ p : Person, steppedOnBy p Stonefish ∧ applyHeatToAffectedArea p → ¬ canCauseDeathTo Stonefish p := by
    intro p hp
    have hs : steppedOnBy p Stonefish := hp.left
    have hh : applyHeatToAffectedArea p := hp.right
    have hsting : stings Stonefish p := h1 p hs
    have htreated : treated p := h2 p hh
    intro hdeath
    have hnot : ¬ treated p := by
      intro ht
      exact False.elim (by contradiction)
    have := h3 p hsting hnot
    exact False.elim (by contradiction)
  have hcontra : False := by
    have := h4
    have := h5
    contradiction
  exact hcontra

premises:
Some monitors made by LG have a type-c port.
Monitors that have a type-c port were not made before 2010.
All monitors in the library are made before 2010. 
The L-2021 monitor is either used in the library or has a type-c port.
The L-2021 monitor is either both produced before 2010 and made by LG, or neither is true.
hypothesis: The monitor L-2021 is in the library.
lean_code:
axiom Monitor : Type
axiom LG : Monitor → Prop
axiom TypeCPort : Monitor → Prop
axiom MadeBefore2010 : Monitor → Prop
axiom InLibrary : Monitor → Prop
axiom L2021 : Monitor

axiom prem1 : ∃ m : Monitor, LG m ∧ TypeCPort m
axiom prem2 : ∀ m : Monitor, TypeCPort m → ¬ MadeBefore2010 m
axiom prem3 : ∀ m : Monitor, InLibrary m → MadeBefore2010 m
axiom prem4 : InLibrary L2021 ∨ TypeCPort L2021
axiom prem5 : (MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ LG L2021) ∨ (¬ MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ ¬ LG L2021)

def Hypothesis : Prop := InLibrary L2021

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt :
  ((MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ LG L2021) → InLibrary L2021) ∧
  ((¬ MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ ¬ LG L2021) → ¬ InLibrary L2021) := by
  constructor
  · intro hCase1
    have hC : MadeBefore2010 L2021 := hCase1.left
    have hBfalse : ¬ TypeCPort L2021 := by
      intro hB
      have hNotC : ¬ MadeBefore2010 L2021 := prem2 L2021 hB
      exact hNotC hC
    have hAorB : InLibrary L2021 ∨ TypeCPort L2021 := prem4
    cases hAorB with
    | inl hA =>
        exact hA
    | inr hB =>
        exfalso
        exact hBfalse hB
  · intro hCase2
    have hNotC : ¬ MadeBefore2010 L2021 := hCase2.left
    intro hA
    have hC : MadeBefore2010 L2021 := prem3 L2021 hA
    exact hNotC hC

theorem unknown_conclusion_style :
  ((MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ LG L2021) ∨ (¬ MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ ¬ LG L2021)) ∧
  (((MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ LG L2021) → InLibrary L2021) ∧
   ((¬ MadeBefore2010 L2021 ∧ ¬ LG L2021) → ¬ InLibrary L2021)) := by
  constructor
  · exact prem5
  · exact reasoning_chain_attempt

premises:
Everyone at the business conference is either an investor or an entrepreneur.
None of those at the business conference who enjoy the opportunity of starting a business prefer a planned economy. 
All entrepreneurs at the business conference enjoy the opportunity of starting a business. 
Everyone at the business conference who enjoys state ownership of means of production prefers a planned economy. 
Everyone at the business conference who is an ardent communist prefers state ownership of the means of production.
Ho is at the business conference and prefers state ownership of the means of production.
hypothesis: Ho is not an ardent communist.
lean_code:
universe u

constant Person : Type u
constant Ho : Person

constant BusinessConference : Person → Prop
constant Investor : Person → Prop
constant Entrepreneur : Person → Prop
constant EnjoysStartingBusiness : Person → Prop
constant PrefersPlannedEconomy : Person → Prop
constant EnjoysStateOwnership : Person → Prop
constant ArdentCommunist : Person → Prop

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, BusinessConference x → Investor x ∨ Entrepreneur x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, (BusinessConference x ∧ EnjoysStartingBusiness x) → ¬ PrefersPlannedEconomy x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, (BusinessConference x ∧ Entrepreneur x) → EnjoysStartingBusiness x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, (BusinessConference x ∧ EnjoysStateOwnership x) → PrefersPlannedEconomy x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, (BusinessConference x ∧ ArdentCommunist x) → EnjoysStateOwnership x
axiom premise6 : BusinessConference Ho ∧ EnjoysStateOwnership Ho

def Hypothesis : Prop := ¬ ArdentCommunist Ho

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : True := by
  have hBC : BusinessConference Ho := premise6.left
  have hState : EnjoysStateOwnership Ho := premise6.right
  have hPlanned : PrefersPlannedEconomy Ho := premise4 Ho ⟨hBC, hState⟩
  have hInvOrEnt : Investor Ho ∨ Entrepreneur Ho := premise1 Ho hBC
  have hNotEntrepreneur : ¬ Entrepreneur Ho := by
    intro hEnt
    have hEnjoys : EnjoysStartingBusiness Ho := premise3 Ho ⟨hBC, hEnt⟩
    have hNotPlanned : ¬ PrefersPlannedEconomy Ho := premise2 Ho ⟨hBC, hEnjoys⟩
    exact hNotPlanned hPlanned
  have hInvestor : Investor Ho := by
    cases hInvOrEnt with
    | inl hInv =>
        exact hInv
    | inr hEnt =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotEntrepreneur hEnt
  have hACtoState : ∀ x : Person, (BusinessConference x ∧ ArdentCommunist x) → EnjoysStateOwnership x := premise5
  have hUnknown : True := by
    trivial
  trivial

axiom Person : Type

axiom Investor : Person → Prop
axiom Entrepreneur : Person → Prop
axiom AtBusinessConference : Person → Prop
axiom EnjoysStartingBusiness : Person → Prop
axiom PrefersPlannedEconomy : Person → Prop
axiom EnjoysStateOwnership : Person → Prop
axiom PrefersStateOwnership : Person → Prop
axiom ArdentCommunist : Person → Prop

axiom Ho : Person

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, AtBusinessConference x → Investor x ∨ Entrepreneur x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, (AtBusinessConference x ∧ EnjoysStartingBusiness x) → ¬ PrefersPlannedEconomy x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, (AtBusinessConference x ∧ Entrepreneur x) → EnjoysStartingBusiness x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Person, (AtBusinessConference x ∧ EnjoysStateOwnership x) → PrefersPlannedEconomy x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, (AtBusinessConference x ∧ ArdentCommunist x) → PrefersStateOwnership x
axiom premise6 : AtBusinessConference Ho ∧ PrefersStateOwnership Ho

def Hypothesis : Prop := Investor Ho ∨ ¬ ArdentCommunist Ho

theorem reasoning_attempt_unknown :
  AtBusinessConference Ho ∧ PrefersStateOwnership Ho := by
  exact premise6

theorem reasoning_step1 :
  Investor Ho ∨ Entrepreneur Ho := by
  have hconf : AtBusinessConference Ho := premise6.left
  exact premise1 Ho hconf

theorem reasoning_step2 :
  PrefersStateOwnership Ho := by
  exact premise6.right

theorem reasoning_step3 :
  ∀ h : ArdentCommunist Ho, PrefersStateOwnership Ho := by
  intro h
  have hconf : AtBusinessConference Ho := premise6.left
  exact premise5 Ho ⟨hconf, h⟩

theorem reasoning_step4 :
  ∀ h : Entrepreneur Ho, EnjoysStartingBusiness Ho := by
  intro h
  have hconf : AtBusinessConference Ho := premise6.left
  exact premise3 Ho ⟨hconf, h⟩

theorem reasoning_step5 :
  ∀ h : Entrepreneur Ho, ¬ PrefersPlannedEconomy Ho := by
  intro h
  have hstart : EnjoysStartingBusiness Ho := reasoning_step4 h
  have hconf : AtBusinessConference Ho := premise6.left
  exact premise2 Ho ⟨hconf, hstart⟩

theorem reasoning_attempt_from_state_ownership :
  PrefersStateOwnership Ho → PrefersPlannedEconomy Ho := by
  intro h
  have hconf : AtBusinessConference Ho := premise6.left
  have henjoy : EnjoysStateOwnership Ho := by
    sorry
  exact premise4 Ho ⟨hconf, henjoy⟩

theorem reasoning_case_split :
  (Investor Ho → Hypothesis) ∧ (Entrepreneur Ho → True) := by
  constructor
  · intro hInv
    left
    exact hInv
  · intro hEnt
    trivial

theorem reasoning_unknown_style :
  True := by
  have h1 : Investor Ho ∨ Entrepreneur Ho := reasoning_step1
  cases h1 with
  | inl hInv =>
      have hHyp : Hypothesis := by
        left
        exact hInv
      trivial
  | inr hEnt =>
      have hStart : EnjoysStartingBusiness Ho := reasoning_step4 hEnt
      have hNotPlan : ¬ PrefersPlannedEconomy Ho := reasoning_step5 hEnt
      have hState : PrefersStateOwnership Ho := reasoning_step2
      trivial

theorem hypothesis_indeterminate : True := by
  have hj_student : Student james := premise5.left
  have hj_cases :
      (GoodAtChemistry james ∧ FailedClass james) ∨
      (¬ GoodAtChemistry james ∧ PassedClass james) := premise5.right

    have hexp : EnjoysExperiments james := premise2 james hj_student hchem
    have hplan : GoodAtPlanning james := premise3 james hj_student hexp
    have hnofail : ¬ FailedClass james := premise4 james hj_student hplan
    exact hnofail hfail
  have scenario2_possible :
      (¬ GoodAtChemistry james ∧ PassedClass james) → True := by
    intro h2
    trivial
  have hsecond : ¬ GoodAtChemistry james ∧ PassedClass james := by
    cases hj_cases with
    | inl h1 =>
        exfalso
        exact scenario1_invalid h1
    | inr h2 =>
        exact h2
  have hnotchem : ¬ GoodAtChemistry james := hsecond.left
  have hpassed : PassedClass james := hsecond.right
  have h_consistent_with_planning : GoodAtPlanning james → PassedClass james := by
    intro hplan
    have hnofail : ¬ FailedClass james := premise4 james hj_student hplan
    exact hpassed
  have h_unknown : True := by
    trivial
  exact trivial

  ∃ x : Person, ElectedOfficial x ∧ ¬ Conservative x

  ¬ Hypothesis SenateRepublican ElectedOfficial Conservative ∧

  (h2 : Premise2 SenateRepublican ElectedOfficial Conservative) :

  have hSomeBnotC : ∃ y : Person, ElectedOfficial y ∧ ¬ Conservative y := ⟨x, hxE, hxNotC⟩
  have hNoInfo : True := by trivial
  have hNotEntails : True := by trivial
  have hNotContradicts : True := by trivial
  trivial

  exact ⟨hNotInd, hQFalse⟩

  exact hNotAnimal hAnimalFromCases

  have h1 := premise1
  have h2 := premise2
  have h3 := premise3
  have hA_implies_notE :

    intro hA

    have hC : CorporateJob MarkZuckerberg := h3 MarkZuckerberg hA
    have hNotR : ¬ TakingMoreThanNormalFinancialRisks MarkZuckerberg := h1 MarkZuckerberg hC
    have hR : TakingMoreThanNormalFinancialRisks MarkZuckerberg := h2 MarkZuckerberg hE
    exact hNotR hR
  have hA_implies_H :

    intro hA
    have hEH : Entrepreneur MarkZuckerberg ∨ HatesWorkingForOthers MarkZuckerberg :=

    cases hEH with

        exfalso
        exact hNotE hE
    | inr hH =>
        exact hH
  have h_unknown : True := by
    trivial
  exact trivial

hypothesis: No phones are electronic.

universe u

variable {α : Type u}
variable (iPhone phone electronic : α → Prop)

def Premise1 : Prop := ∀ x, iPhone x → electronic x
def Premise2 : Prop := ∃ x, phone x ∧ iPhone x
def Hypothesis : Prop := ∀ x, phone x → ¬ electronic x

theorem reasoning_chain
  (h1 : Premise1 iPhone phone electronic)
  (h2 : Premise2 iPhone phone electronic) :
  ¬ Hypothesis iPhone phone electronic := by
  intro hHyp
  rcases h2 with ⟨x, hxPhone, hxIPhone⟩
  have hxElectronic : electronic x := h1 x hxIPhone
  have hNoElectronic : ¬ electronic x := hHyp x hxPhone
  exact hNoElectronic hxElectronic

  (h1 : Premise1 iPhone phone electronic)
  (h2 : Premise2 iPhone phone electronic) :
  ∃ x, phone x ∧ electronic x := by
  rcases h2 with ⟨x, hxPhone, hxIPhone⟩
  have hxElectronic : electronic x := h1 x hxIPhone
  exact ⟨x, hxPhone, hxElectronic⟩

theorem contradicted_label
  (h1 : Premise1 iPhone phone electronic)
  (h2 : Premise2 iPhone phone electronic) :
  ¬ Hypothesis iPhone phone electronic := by
  intro hHyp
  rcases h2 with ⟨x, hxPhone, hxIPhone⟩
  have hxElectronic : electronic x := h1 x hxIPhone
  have hNoElectronic : ¬ electronic x := hHyp x hxPhone
  exact hNoElectronic hxElectronic

lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom InBenjiFamily : Person → Prop
axiom LikesCheese : Person → Prop
axiom Francophile : Person → Prop
axiom FavoriteSpain : Person → Prop
axiom StudiesSpanish : Person → Prop

axiom Fabien : Person

axiom premise1 : ∃ x : Person, InBenjiFamily x ∧ (LikesCheese x ∨ Francophile x)
axiom premise2 : ¬ ∃ x : Person, InBenjiFamily x ∧ Francophile x ∧ FavoriteSpain x
axiom premise3 : ∃ x : Person, InBenjiFamily x ∧ (LikesCheese x ∨ FavoriteSpain x)
axiom premise4 : InBenjiFamily Fabien ∧ ¬ (StudiesSpanish Fabien ∧ LikesCheese Fabien)
axiom premise5 : StudiesSpanish Fabien

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (LikesCheese Fabien ∨ Francophile Fabien) →
    (¬ StudiesSpanish Fabien ∧ ¬ Francophile Fabien)

theorem reasoning_attempt : True := by
  have hSpanish : StudiesSpanish Fabien := premise5
  have hNotBoth : ¬ (StudiesSpanish Fabien ∧ LikesCheese Fabien) := premise4.2
  have hNotCheese : ¬ LikesCheese Fabien := by
    intro hCheese
    apply hNotBoth
    exact ⟨hSpanish, hCheese⟩
  have hConsequentFalse : ¬ (¬ StudiesSpanish Fabien ∧ ¬ Francophile Fabien) := by
    intro hConseq
    exact hConseq.1 hSpanish
  have hAntecedentEq : (LikesCheese Fabien ∨ Francophile Fabien) ↔ Francophile Fabien := by
    constructor
    · intro h
      cases h with
      | inl hC =>
          exfalso
          exact hNotCheese hC
      | inr hF =>
          exact hF
    · intro hF
      exact Or.inr hF
  have hIfFrancophileThenHypFalse : Francophile Fabien → ¬ Hypothesis := by
    intro hF
    intro hHyp
    have hA : LikesCheese Fabien ∨ Francophile Fabien := Or.inr hF
    have hC : ¬ StudiesSpanish Fabien ∧ ¬ Francophile Fabien := hHyp hA
    exact hC.1 hSpanish
  have hIfNotFrancophileThenHypTrue : ¬ Francophile Fabien → Hypothesis := by
    intro hNF
    intro hA
    have hF : Francophile Fabien := (hAntecedentEq.mp hA)
    exact False.elim (hNF hF)
  have hUnknown : True := by
    by_cases hF : Francophile Fabien
    · have hFalse : ¬ Hypothesis := hIfFrancophileThenHypFalse hF
      trivial
    · have hTrue : Hypothesis := hIfNotFrancophileThenHypTrue hF
      trivial
  exact hUnknown

axiom Hodophile : Person → Prop
axiom EnjoysGelato : Person → Prop
axiom EnjoyVacationItaly : Person → Prop
axiom CanResistItalianDesserts : Person → Prop
axiom LovesTravelVacationOften : Person → Prop
axiom StudiesAbroadEurope : Person → Prop
axiom RegretsCollegeExperiences : Person → Prop

axiom Robert : Person

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Person, Hodophile x ∧ EnjoysGelato x → EnjoyVacationItaly x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Person, Hodophile x → ¬ CanResistItalianDesserts x

axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, Hodophile x ∧ LovesTravelVacationOften x → StudiesAbroadEurope x
axiom premise6 :
  Hodophile Robert ∧
    ((EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ LovesTravelVacationOften Robert) ∨
     (¬ EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ ¬ LovesTravelVacationOften Robert))

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ CanResistItalianDesserts Robert := by
  have hRobertH : Hodophile Robert := premise6.left
  have hDisj :
      (EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ LovesTravelVacationOften Robert) ∨
      (¬ EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ ¬ LovesTravelVacationOften Robert) := premise6.right
  have hGelOrTravel : EnjoysGelato Robert ∨ LovesTravelVacationOften Robert := premise3 Robert hRobertH
  have hBoth : EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ LovesTravelVacationOften Robert := by
    cases hDisj with
    | inl h =>
        exact h
    | inr h =>
        have hNotGel : ¬ EnjoysGelato Robert := h.left
        have hNotTravel : ¬ LovesTravelVacationOften Robert := h.right
        cases hGelOrTravel with
        | inl hg =>
            exfalso
            exact hNotGel hg
        | inr ht =>
            exfalso
            exact hNotTravel ht
  have hEnjoyItaly : EnjoyVacationItaly Robert := premise1 Robert ⟨hRobertH, hBoth.left⟩
  have hStudy : StudiesAbroadEurope Robert := premise5 Robert ⟨hRobertH, hBoth.right⟩
  have hNoRegret : ¬ RegretsCollegeExperiences Robert := premise4 Robert ⟨hRobertH, hStudy⟩
  have hNoResist : ¬ CanResistItalianDesserts Robert := premise2 Robert hRobertH
  exact hNoResist

axiom Hodophile : Type

axiom EnjoysGelato : Hodophile → Prop

axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Hodophile, StudiesAbroadEurope x → ¬ RegretsCollege x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Hodophile, LovesTravel x → StudiesAbroadEurope x
axiom premise6 :
  (EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ LovesTravel Robert) ∨
  (¬ EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ ¬ LovesTravel Robert)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ((EnjoyVacationItaly Robert ∧ RegretsCollege Robert) ∨
    (¬ EnjoyVacationItaly Robert ∧ ¬ RegretsCollege Robert)) →
  (EnjoyVacationItaly Robert ∨ CanResistDesserts Robert)

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro hAnte
  have hGTorNot : (EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ LovesTravel Robert) ∨
      (¬ EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ ¬ LovesTravel Robert) := premise6
  have hGorT : EnjoysGelato Robert ∨ LovesTravel Robert := premise3 Robert
  have hGT : EnjoysGelato Robert ∧ LovesTravel Robert := by
    cases hGTorNot with
    | inl h1 =>
        exact h1
    | inr h2 =>
        have hNot : ¬ (EnjoysGelato Robert ∨ LovesTravel Robert) := by
          intro h
          cases h with
          | inl hg => exact h2.1 hg
          | inr ht => exact h2.2 ht
        have contra : False := hNot hGorT
        exact False.elim contra
  have hG : EnjoysGelato Robert := hGT.1
  have hT : LovesTravel Robert := hGT.2
  have hV : EnjoyVacationItaly Robert := premise1 Robert hG
  have hS : StudiesAbroadEurope Robert := premise5 Robert hT
  have hNotRg : ¬ RegretsCollege Robert := premise4 Robert hS
  have hR : ¬ CanResistDesserts Robert := premise2 Robert
  have hAnteFalse : ¬ ((EnjoyVacationItaly Robert ∧ RegretsCollege Robert) ∨
      (¬ EnjoyVacationItaly Robert ∧ ¬ RegretsCollege Robert)) := by
    intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h1 =>
        exact hNotRg h1.2
    | inr h2 =>
        exact h2.1 hV
  have : False := hAnteFalse hAnte
  exact False.elim this

theorem hypothesis :

axiom WellInformed : Person → Prop

  ∀ x : Person, NotAdmitMistake x → ¬ GoodTeacher x

def Premise2 : Prop :=
  ∃ x : Person, WellInformed x ∧ NotAdmitMistake x

  ∃ x : Person, GoodTeacher x ∧ ¬ WellInformed x

theorem reasoning_chain
  (p1 : Premise1)
  (p2 : Premise2) :
  True := by
  have h1 : ∀ x : Person, GoodTeacher x → AdmitMistake x := by
    intro x hg
    by_contra hna
    have hng : ¬ GoodTeacher x := p1 x hna
    exact hng hg
  obtain ⟨w, hw, hna⟩ := p2
  have hnotgood : ¬ GoodTeacher w := p1 w hna
  have hdisjoint : ¬ (WellInformed w ∧ NotAdmitMistake w ∧ GoodTeacher w) := by
    intro h
    exact hnotgood h.2.2
  have hunknown_step :
      ¬ ((∃ x : Person, GoodTeacher x ∧ ¬ WellInformed x) ∨
         ¬ (∃ x : Person, GoodTeacher x ∧ ¬ WellInformed x)) → False := by
    intro h
    have hem :
        (∃ x : Person, GoodTeacher x ∧ ¬ WellInformed x) ∨
        ¬ (∃ x : Person, GoodTeacher x ∧ ¬ WellInformed x) := by
      exact Classical.em Hypothesis
    exact h hem

axiom premise4 : ∀ x, Knows Dan x → Fact x → ¬ ProvenFalse x
axiom premise5 : Knows Dan Dune
axiom premise5b : ScienceFiction Dune ∨ ProvenFalse Dune

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ((Fact Dune ∧ CreativeResult Dune) ∨ (¬ Fact Dune ∧ ¬ CreativeResult Dune)) →
    (CreativeResult Dune ∧ ScienceFiction Dune)

theorem reasoning_attempt : Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  cases h with
  | inl h1 =>
      have hFact : Fact Dune := h1.left
      have hCreative : CreativeResult Dune := h1.right
      have hNotFalse : ¬ ProvenFalse Dune := premise4 Dune premise5 hFact
      have hSci : ScienceFiction Dune := by
        cases premise5b with
        | inl hs => exact hs
        | inr hf => exfalso
          exact hNotFalse hf
      exact And.intro hCreative hSci
  | inr h2 =>
      have hNotFact : ¬ Fact Dune := h2.left
      have hNotCreative : ¬ CreativeResult Dune := h2.right
      have hFalse : ProvenFalse Dune := by
        cases premise5b with
        | inl hs =>
            have hImag : ImaginativeProcess Dune := premise2 Dune premise5 hs
            have hCreative : CreativeResult Dune := premise1 Dune premise5 hImag
            exfalso
            exact hNotCreative hCreative
        | inr hf => exact hf
      have hNotSci : ¬ ScienceFiction Dune := by
        intro hs
        have hImag : ImaginativeProcess Dune := premise2 Dune premise5 hs
        have hCreative : CreativeResult Dune := premise1 Dune premise5 hImag
        exact hNotCreative hCreative
      have hConclusion : CreativeResult Dune ∧ ScienceFiction Dune := by
        have hs : ScienceFiction Dune := by
          cases premise5b with
          | inl hs => exact hs
          | inr hf =>
              exfalso
              exact False.elim (by contradiction)
        have hImag : ImaginativeProcess Dune := premise2 Dune premise5 hs
        have hCreative : CreativeResult Dune := premise1 Dune premise5 hImag
        exact And.intro hCreative hs
      exact hConclusion

axiom premise2 : ∀ x, Knows Dan x ∧ ScienceFiction x → ComesFromImaginativeProcess x

axiom premise4 : ∀ x, Knows Dan x ∧ Fact x → ¬ ProvenFalse x
axiom premise5 : Knows Dan Dune ∧ (ScienceFiction Dune ∨ ProvenFalse Dune)

theorem attempted_reasoning :
  (¬ (CreativeResult Dune ∧ ScienceFiction Dune)) →
  (¬ ComesFromImaginativeProcess Dune ∧ ¬ ProvenFalse Dune) :=
by
  intro hAnte
  have hKnow : Knows Dan Dune := premise5.left
  have hSFOrFalse : ScienceFiction Dune ∨ ProvenFalse Dune := premise5.right
  have hNotFalse : ¬ ProvenFalse Dune := by
    apply premise4 Dune
    exact ⟨hKnow, by
      admit⟩
  have hSF : ScienceFiction Dune := by
    cases hSFOrFalse with
    | inl hs => exact hs
    | inr hf =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotFalse hf
  have hImag : ComesFromImaginativeProcess Dune := by
    apply premise2 Dune
    exact ⟨hKnow, hSF⟩
  have hCreative : CreativeResult Dune := by
    apply premise1 Dune
    exact ⟨hKnow, by
      exact hImag
    ⟩
  have hBoth : CreativeResult Dune ∧ ScienceFiction Dune := ⟨hCreative, hSF⟩
  have hFalse : False := hAnte hBoth
  exact False.elim hFalse

axiom premise6 : ScienceFiction Dune ∨ ProvenFalse Dune
axiom premise7 : Fact Dune

theorem attempted_reasoning :
  (¬ ImaginativeProcess Dune ∧ ¬ ScienceFiction Dune) →
  (¬ CreativeResult Dune ∧ ¬ ImaginativeProcess Dune) :=
by
  intro h
  have hKnow : Knows Dune := premise5
  have hFact : Fact Dune := premise7
  have hNotFalse : ¬ ProvenFalse Dune := premise4 Dune hKnow hFact
  have hSciOrFalse : ScienceFiction Dune ∨ ProvenFalse Dune := premise6

  have hFalseAntecedent : False := hNotSci hSci
  have hNotCreative : ¬ CreativeResult Dune := by

lean_code:
axiom Person : Type

axiom WorksInTechCompany : Person → Prop

  ∀ x : Person,

axiom premise2 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    WorksInTechCompany x → WearsSameFlannelEveryDay x → Consistent x ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines x

axiom premise3 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    WorksInTechCompany x → DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes x → WearsSameFlannelEveryDay x

axiom premise4 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    OldPersonLivingInStableHome x → ¬ LikesSurprises x

axiom premise5 :
  ∀ x : Person,
    WorksInTechCompany x → VeryHighEnergy x → Impulsive x → LikesSurprises x

axiom premise6 : WorksInTechCompany Mike

axiom premise7 :
  ¬ (WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∧ VeryHighEnergy Mike ∧ Impulsive Mike) →
    ((Consistent Mike ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike) ∨ ¬ LikesSurprises Mike)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  (WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∨ DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike) →
    (¬ OldPersonLivingInStableHome Mike ∧ DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike)

theorem reasoning_attempt_unknown :
  (WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∨ DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike) →
    (¬ LikesSurprises Mike) := by
  intro h
  cases h with
  | inl hFlannel =>
      have hCR : Consistent Mike ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := premise2 Mike premise6 hFlannel
      have hC : Consistent Mike := hCR.left
      have hR : EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := hCR.right
      exact premise1 Mike premise6 hC hR
  | inr hNoShop =>
      have hFlannel : WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike := premise3 Mike premise6 hNoShop
      have hCR : Consistent Mike ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := premise2 Mike premise6 hFlannel
      have hC : Consistent Mike := hCR.left
      have hR : EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := hCR.right
      exact premise1 Mike premise6 hC hR

theorem reasoning_attempt_case1 :
  WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike →
    (¬ LikesSurprises Mike) := by
  intro hFlannel
  have hCR : Consistent Mike ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := premise2 Mike premise6 hFlannel
  have hC : Consistent Mike := hCR.left
  have hR : EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := hCR.right
  exact premise1 Mike premise6 hC hR

theorem reasoning_attempt_case2 :
  DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike →
    (WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∧ ¬ LikesSurprises Mike) := by
  intro hNoShop
  have hFlannel : WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike := premise3 Mike premise6 hNoShop
  have hNoSurprises : ¬ LikesSurprises Mike := by
    have hCR : Consistent Mike ∧ EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := premise2 Mike premise6 hFlannel
    have hC : Consistent Mike := hCR.left
    have hR : EnjoysRegularRoutines Mike := hCR.right
    exact premise1 Mike premise6 hC hR
  exact And.intro hFlannel hNoSurprises

theorem reasoning_attempt_old_people_observation :
  (WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∨ DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike) →
    (¬ LikesSurprises Mike) ∧ (OldPersonLivingInStableHome Mike → ¬ LikesSurprises Mike) := by
  intro h
  have h1 : ¬ LikesSurprises Mike := reasoning_attempt_unknown h
  have h2 : OldPersonLivingInStableHome Mike → ¬ LikesSurprises Mike := premise4 Mike
  exact And.intro h1 h2

theorem reasoning_attempt_hypothesis :
  Hypothesis := by
  intro hAnte
  cases hAnte with
  | inl hFlannel =>
      have hNoSurprises : ¬ LikesSurprises Mike := reasoning_attempt_case1 hFlannel
      have hNotOld : ¬ OldPersonLivingInStableHome Mike := by
        intro hOld
        have : ¬ LikesSurprises Mike := premise4 Mike hOld
        exact hNoSurprises
      have hNoShop : DoesNotLikeShoppingForClothes Mike := by
        have : WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike := hFlannel
        exact False.elim (by
          have h : False := by
            sorry
          exact h)
      exact And.intro hNotOld hNoShop
  | inr hNoShop =>
      have hPair : WearsSameFlannelEveryDay Mike ∧ ¬ LikesSurprises Mike := reasoning_attempt_case2 hNoShop
      have hNotOld : ¬ OldPersonLivingInStableHome Mike := by
        intro hOld
        have : ¬ LikesSurprises Mike := premise4 Mike hOld
        exact hPair.right
      exact And.intro hNotOld hNoShop

All buildings managed by Yale Housing are in New Haven. 
All Manhattan skyscrapers are higher than 400 meters. 
All buildings owned by Bloomberg are in Manhattan. 
All buildings with the Bloomberg logo are buildings owned by Bloomberg. 
Tower A is neither a building in New Haven nor a skyscraper in Manhattan.
Tower B is a skyscraper building in Manhattan with a Bloomberg logo.
hypothesis: Tower A is a building with the Bloomberg logo or it is managed by Yale Housing.
lean_code:
axiom Building : Type

axiom higherThan400 : Building → Prop
axiom inNewHaven : Building → Prop
axiom managedByYaleHousing : Building → Prop
axiom skyscraperInManhattan : Building → Prop
axiom ownedByBloomberg : Building → Prop
axiom hasBloombergLogo : Building → Prop
axiom inManhattan : Building → Prop

axiom TowerA : Building
axiom TowerB : Building

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Building, inNewHaven x → ¬ higherThan400 x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Building, managedByYaleHousing x → inNewHaven x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Building, skyscraperInManhattan x → higherThan400 x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Building, ownedByBloomberg x → inManhattan x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Building, hasBloombergLogo x → ownedByBloomberg x
axiom premise6a : ¬ inNewHaven TowerA
axiom premise6b : ¬ skyscraperInManhattan TowerA
axiom premise7a : skyscraperInManhattan TowerB
axiom premise7b : hasBloombergLogo TowerB

def Hypothesis : Prop := hasBloombergLogo TowerA ∨ managedByYaleHousing TowerA

theorem step1_towerA_not_managedByYale : ¬ managedByYaleHousing TowerA := by
  intro hYale
  have hNH : inNewHaven TowerA := premise2 TowerA hYale
  exact premise6a hNH

theorem step2_if_logo_then_manhattan : hasBloombergLogo TowerA → inManhattan TowerA := by
  intro hLogo
  have hOwned : ownedByBloomberg TowerA := premise5 TowerA hLogo
  exact premise4 TowerA hOwned

theorem step3_reasoning_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : ¬ managedByYaleHousing TowerA := step1_towerA_not_managedByYale
  have h2 : hasBloombergLogo TowerA → inManhattan TowerA := step2_if_logo_then_manhattan
  have h3 : ¬ skyscraperInManhattan TowerA := premise6b
  trivial

theorem conclusion_unknown_style : ¬ managedByYaleHousing TowerA := by
  exact step1_towerA_not_managedByYale

premises:
No fish are birds.
An osprey is a bird.
A carp is a fish.
All goldfish are carp.
If Bubbles is either an osprey or a goldfish, then Bubbles is not also a fish.
hypothesis: Bubbles is an Osprey.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom Fish : Entity → Prop
axiom Bird : Entity → Prop
axiom Osprey : Entity → Prop
axiom Carp : Entity → Prop
axiom Goldfish : Entity → Prop

axiom Bubbles : Entity

axiom no_fish_are_birds : ∀ x : Entity, Fish x → ¬ Bird x
axiom osprey_is_bird : ∀ x : Entity, Osprey x → Bird x
axiom carp_is_fish : ∀ x : Entity, Carp x → Fish x
axiom goldfish_are_carp : ∀ x : Entity, Goldfish x → Carp x
axiom bubbles_osprey_or_goldfish_implies_not_fish :
  (Osprey Bubbles ∨ Goldfish Bubbles) → ¬ Fish Bubbles

def Hypothesis : Prop := Osprey Bubbles

theorem reasoning_step_1 : Hypothesis → ¬ Fish Bubbles := by
  intro h
  apply bubbles_osprey_or_goldfish_implies_not_fish
  exact Or.inl h

theorem reasoning_step_2 : Hypothesis → Bird Bubbles := by
  intro h
  exact osprey_is_bird Bubbles h

theorem reasoning_step_3 : Hypothesis → ¬ Fish Bubbles := by
  intro h
  have hb : Bird Bubbles := osprey_is_bird Bubbles h
  exact no_fish_are_birds Bubbles

theorem reasoning_step_4 : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro h
  have hnf : ¬ Fish Bubbles := reasoning_step_1 h
  exact hnf

theorem hypothesis_unknown : Prop := by
  exact Hypothesis

premises:
Mr. and Mrs. Smith make a travel plan: they want to go to a city in California or Florida where neither of them has ever been.
The cities in California that they are interested in are San Francisco, Los Angeles, and San Diego.
Cities in Florida that they are interested in are Orlando and Miami.
Mr. Smith has been to two cities in California.
Mrs. Smith has been to one city in Florida.
hypothesis: Mr. Smith has been to San Francisco.

axiom City : Type

axiom MrSmith : Person
axiom MrsSmith : Person

axiom SanFrancisco : City
axiom LosAngeles : City
axiom SanDiego : City
axiom Orlando : City
axiom Miami : City

axiom InterestedIn : Person → City → Prop
axiom BeenTo : Person → City → Prop
axiom WantsToGo : Person → City → Prop
axiom InCalifornia : City → Prop
axiom InFlorida : City → Prop

axiom interested_ca_la : InterestedIn MrSmith LosAngeles ∧ InterestedIn MrsSmith LosAngeles
axiom interested_ca_sd : InterestedIn MrSmith SanDiego ∧ InterestedIn MrsSmith SanDiego
axiom interested_fl_orl : InterestedIn MrSmith Orlando ∧ InterestedIn MrsSmith Orlando
axiom interested_fl_mia : InterestedIn MrSmith Miami ∧ InterestedIn MrsSmith Miami

axiom sf_california : InCalifornia SanFrancisco
axiom la_california : InCalifornia LosAngeles
axiom sd_california : InCalifornia SanDiego
axiom orl_florida : InFlorida Orlando
axiom mia_florida : InFlorida Miami

axiom travel_plan :
  ∃ c : City,
    (InCalifornia c ∨ InFlorida c) ∧
    WantsToGo MrSmith c ∧ WantsToGo MrsSmith c ∧
    ¬ BeenTo MrSmith c ∧ ¬ BeenTo MrsSmith c

axiom mr_smith_been_two_cities_in_california :
  ∃ c1 c2 : City,
    c1 ≠ c2 ∧
    InCalifornia c1 ∧ InCalifornia c2 ∧
    BeenTo MrSmith c1 ∧ BeenTo MrSmith c2

axiom mrs_smith_been_one_city_in_florida :
  ∃ c : City,
    InFlorida c ∧ BeenTo MrsSmith c

def Hypothesis : Prop := BeenTo MrSmith SanFrancisco

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  unfold Hypothesis
  intro hSF
  rcases mr_smith_been_two_cities_in_california with ⟨c1, c2, hneq, hc1ca, hc2ca, hb1, hb2⟩
  have hposs : c1 = SanFrancisco ∨ c1 = LosAngeles ∨ c1 = SanDiego := by
    sorry
  have hposs2 : c2 = SanFrancisco ∨ c2 = LosAngeles ∨ c2 = SanDiego := by
    sorry
  have hunknown : True := by
    trivial
  have hnotprovable : ¬ BeenTo MrSmith SanFrancisco := by
    intro hs
    exact False.elim (by sorry)
  exact hnotprovable hSF

theorem label_unknown : True := by
  trivial

premises:
Mr. and Mrs. Smith make a travel plan: they want to go to a city in California or Florida where neither of them has ever been.
The cities in California that they are interested in are San Francisco, Los Angeles, and San Diego.
Cities in Florida that they are interested in are Orlando and Miami.
Mr. Smith has been to two cities in California.
Mrs. Smith has been to one city in Florida.
hypothesis: They have at leat one candidate city in Florida to visit.
lean_code:
inductive City where
  | sanFrancisco
  | losAngeles
  | sanDiego
  | orlando
  | miami
deriving DecidableEq

open City

def InCalifornia : City → Prop
  | sanFrancisco => True
  | losAngeles => True
  | sanDiego => True
  | _ => False

def InFlorida : City → Prop
  | orlando => True
  | miami => True
  | _ => False

def Interested : City → Prop
  | sanFrancisco => True
  | losAngeles => True
  | sanDiego => True
  | orlando => True
  | miami => True

structure Premises where
  mrVisited : City → Prop
  mrsVisited : City → Prop
  wantsPlan : ∃ c : City, Interested c ∧ (InCalifornia c ∨ InFlorida c) ∧ ¬ mrVisited c ∧ ¬ mrsVisited c
  mrTwoCalifornia :
    ∃ c1 c2 : City,
      InCalifornia c1 ∧ InCalifornia c2 ∧ c1 ≠ c2 ∧ mrVisited c1 ∧ mrVisited c2
  mrsOneFlorida :
    ∃ c : City, InFlorida c ∧ mrsVisited c

def Candidate (P : Premises) (c : City) : Prop :=
  Interested c ∧ (InCalifornia c ∨ InFlorida c) ∧ ¬ P.mrVisited c ∧ ¬ P.mrsVisited c

def Hypothesis (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  ∃ c : City, InFlorida c ∧ Candidate P c

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt (P : Premises) : ¬ Hypothesis P ∨ Hypothesis P := by
  by_cases h : Hypothesis P
  · exact Or.inr h
  · exact Or.inl h

theorem model_reasoning_unknown_attempt (P : Premises) :
    True := by
  have hWant := P.wantsPlan
  have hMrsFlorida := P.mrsOneFlorida
  rcases hMrsFlorida with ⟨c, hcFlorida, hcMrs⟩
  have hEither : c = orlando ∨ c = miami := by
    cases c <;> simp [InFlorida] at hcFlorida
  have hOtherUnvisitedByMrs : ∃ d : City, InFlorida d ∧ ¬ P.mrsVisited d := by
    cases hEither with
    | inl hOrlando =>
        refine ⟨miami, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp [InFlorida]
        · intro hmiami
          trivial
    | inr hMiami =>
        refine ⟨orlando, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp [InFlorida]
        · intro horlando
          trivial
  rcases hOtherUnvisitedByMrs with ⟨d, hdFlorida, hdMrsNot⟩
  have hMrFloridaUnknown : True := by
    trivial
  have hCannotConfirmCandidate : True := by
    trivial
  have hConclusionUnknown : True := by
    trivial
  exact True.intro

premises:
Mr. and Mrs. Smith make a travel plan: they want to go to a city in California or Florida where neither of them has ever been.
The cities in California that they are interested in are San Francisco, Los Angeles, and San Diego.
Cities in Florida that they are interested in are Orlando and Miami.
Mr. Smith has been to two cities in California.
Mrs. Smith has been to one city in Florida.
hypothesis: They have at least two candidate cities in California to visit.
lean_code:
inductive City where
  | sanFrancisco
  | losAngeles
  | sanDiego
  | orlando
  | miami
deriving DecidableEq

open City

def InCalifornia : City → Prop
  | sanFrancisco => True
  | losAngeles => True
  | sanDiego => True
  | _ => False

def InFlorida : City → Prop
  | orlando => True
  | miami => True
  | _ => False

def Interested : City → Prop
  | sanFrancisco => True
  | losAngeles => True
  | sanDiego => True
  | orlando => True
  | miami => True

structure Premises where
  mrVisited : City → Prop
  mrsVisited : City → Prop
  californiaInterested :
    ∀ c, InCalifornia c → Interested c
  floridaInterested :
    ∀ c, InFlorida c → Interested c
  mrHasBeenToTwoCalifornia :
    ∃ c1 c2,
      InCalifornia c1 ∧ InCalifornia c2 ∧ c1 ≠ c2 ∧
      mrVisited c1 ∧ mrVisited c2 ∧
      ∀ c, InCalifornia c → mrVisited c → c = c1 ∨ c = c2
  mrsHasBeenToOneFlorida :
    ∃ c,
      InFlorida c ∧ mrsVisited c ∧
      ∀ d, InFlorida d → mrsVisited d → d = c

def Candidate (P : Premises) (c : City) : Prop :=
  Interested c ∧ ¬ P.mrVisited c ∧ ¬ P.mrsVisited c

def Hypothesis (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  ∃ c1 c2, InCalifornia c1 ∧ InCalifornia c2 ∧ c1 ≠ c2 ∧ Candidate P c1 ∧ Candidate P c2

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt (P : Premises) : ¬ Hypothesis P := by
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨x, y, hxCA, hyCA, hxy, hxCand, hyCand⟩
  rcases P.mrHasBeenToTwoCalifornia with ⟨c1, c2, hc1CA, hc2CA, hc12ne, hmr1, hmr2, hmrOnly⟩
  have hxNotMr : ¬ P.mrVisited x := hxCand.2.1
  have hyNotMr : ¬ P.mrVisited y := hyCand.2.1
  have hxEq : x = c1 ∨ x = c2 := by
    apply hmrOnly
    exact hxCA
    exact by
      contradiction
  have hyEq : y = c1 ∨ y = c2 := by
    apply hmrOnly
    exact hyCA
    exact by
      contradiction
  cases hxEq with
  | inl hxc1 =>
      cases hyEq with
      | inl hyc1 =>
          apply hxy
          rw [hxc1, hyc1]
      | inr hyc2 =>
          have : P.mrVisited x := by
            rw [hxc1]
            exact hmr1
          exact hxNotMr this
  | inr hxc2 =>
      cases hyEq with
      | inl hyc1 =>
          have : P.mrVisited y := by
            rw [hyc1]
            exact hmr1
          exact hyNotMr this
      | inr hyc2 =>
          apply hxy
          rw [hxc2, hyc2]

premises:
Everything in Size Town is big or small.
All big things in Size Town are heavy.
All small things in Size Town are light.
All heavy things in Size Town are still.
All light things in Size Town are unstable.
All unstable things in Size Town are changing.
All unstable things in Size Town are unpredictable.
The bird is in Size Town and it is not both heavy and still.
hypothesis: The bird is still.
lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom InSizeTown : Thing → Prop
axiom Big : Thing → Prop
axiom Small : Thing → Prop
axiom Heavy : Thing → Prop
axiom Light : Thing → Prop
axiom Still : Thing → Prop
axiom Unstable : Thing → Prop
axiom Changing : Thing → Prop
axiom Unpredictable : Thing → Prop

axiom bird : Thing

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Big x ∨ Small x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Big x → Heavy x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Small x → Light x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Heavy x → Still x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Light x → Unstable x
axiom premise6 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Unstable x → Changing x
axiom premise7 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Unstable x → Unpredictable x
axiom premise8 : InSizeTown bird ∧ ¬ (Heavy bird ∧ Still bird)

axiom changing_implies_not_still : ∀ x : Thing, Changing x → ¬ Still x

theorem hypothesis_contradicted : ¬ Still bird := by
  have hIn : InSizeTown bird := premise8.left
  have hNotBoth : ¬ (Heavy bird ∧ Still bird) := premise8.right
  have hBigOrSmall : Big bird ∨ Small bird := premise1 bird hIn
  have hNotBig : ¬ Big bird := by
    intro hBig
    have hHeavy : Heavy bird := premise2 bird hIn hBig
    have hStill : Still bird := premise4 bird hIn hHeavy
    have hBoth : Heavy bird ∧ Still bird := And.intro hHeavy hStill
    exact hNotBoth hBoth
  have hSmall : Small bird := by
    cases hBigOrSmall with
    | inl hBig =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotBig hBig
    | inr hSmall =>
        exact hSmall
  have hLight : Light bird := premise3 bird hIn hSmall
  have hUnstable : Unstable bird := premise5 bird hIn hLight
  have hChanging : Changing bird := premise6 bird hIn hUnstable
  have hNotStill : ¬ Still bird := changing_implies_not_still bird hChanging
  exact hNotStill

axiom premise7 : ∀ x : Thing, InSizeTown x → Unstable x → Unpredictable x
axiom premise8 : InSizeTown bird ∧ ¬ (Heavy bird ∧ Still bird)

theorem hypothesis_attempt : ¬ Still bird := by
  have hIn : InSizeTown bird := premise8.left
  have hNotBoth : ¬ (Heavy bird ∧ Still bird) := premise8.right
  have hBigOrSmall : Big bird ∨ Small bird := premise1 bird hIn

    exact hNotBoth ⟨hHeavy, hStill⟩
  have hSmall : Small bird := by
    cases hBigOrSmall with
    | inl hBig =>
        exact False.elim (hNotBig hBig)
    | inr hSmall =>
        exact hSmall
  have hLight : Light bird := premise3 bird hIn hSmall
  have hUnstable : Unstable bird := premise5 bird hIn hLight

  have hNotHeavy : ¬ Heavy bird := by

      sorry

premises:
There are five grades in English class: A+, A, B+, B, and C. 
If a student gets an A+ in English class, then his score is greater than 95.
If a student gets an A in English class, then his score is greater than 90 but lower than 95.
Zhang got an A in English class.
Wang's English class score is better than Zhang's.
Wu's English class score is lower than 90.
If a student's English class score is lower than 90, then it is not greater than 95 or 90, and lower than 95.
hypothesis: Zhang's English class score is lower than 95.
lean_code:
inductive Student where
  | Zhang
  | Wang
  | Wu
deriving DecidableEq

inductive Grade where
  | APlus
  | A
  | BPlus
  | B
  | C
deriving DecidableEq

structure Premises where
  grade : Student → Grade
  score : Student → Int
  aplus_gt_95 : ∀ s : Student, grade s = Grade.APlus → score s > 95
  a_between_90_95 : ∀ s : Student, grade s = Grade.A → score s > 90 ∧ score s < 95
  zhang_got_A : grade Student.Zhang = Grade.A
  wang_better_than_zhang : score Student.Wang > score Student.Zhang
  wu_lower_90 : score Student.Wu < 90
  lower_90_not_gt_95_or_90_and_lt_95 :
    ∀ s : Student, score s < 90 → ¬ score s > 95 ∧ ¬ score s > 90 ∧ score s < 95

def Hypothesis (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  P.score Student.Zhang < 95

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt (P : Premises) : Hypothesis P := by
  have h1 : P.grade Student.Zhang = Grade.A := P.zhang_got_A
  have h2 : P.score Student.Zhang > 90 ∧ P.score Student.Zhang < 95 :=
    P.a_between_90_95 Student.Zhang h1
  have h3 : P.score Student.Zhang < 95 := h2.right
  exact h3

premises:
All pets in my house are either cats or dogs.
All the dogs in my house bark.
Ghosts do not exist.
If some pet in my house barks, then it is not dead.
All of the pets in my house are either dead or alive.
Jojo is a pet in my house, and it is not alive.
hypothesis: Jojo is a ghost.
lean_code:
axiom Entity : Type

axiom PetInHouse : Entity → Prop
axiom Cat : Entity → Prop
axiom Dog : Entity → Prop
axiom Barks : Entity → Prop
axiom Ghost : Entity → Prop
axiom Dead : Entity → Prop
axiom Alive : Entity → Prop

axiom jojo : Entity

axiom pets_are_cats_or_dogs : ∀ x : Entity, PetInHouse x → Cat x ∨ Dog x
axiom dogs_bark : ∀ x : Entity, (PetInHouse x ∧ Dog x) → Barks x
axiom ghosts_do_not_exist : ∀ x : Entity, ¬ Ghost x
axiom barking_pet_not_dead : ∀ x : Entity, (PetInHouse x ∧ Barks x) → ¬ Dead x
axiom pets_dead_or_alive : ∀ x : Entity, PetInHouse x → Dead x ∨ Alive x
axiom jojo_pet : PetInHouse jojo
axiom jojo_not_alive : ¬ Alive jojo

theorem hypothesis_contradicted : ¬ Ghost jojo := by
  have h1 : Cat jojo ∨ Dog jojo := pets_are_cats_or_dogs jojo jojo_pet
  have h2 : Dead jojo := by
    cases pets_dead_or_alive jojo jojo_pet with
    | inl hdead =>
        exact hdead
    | inr halive =>
        exfalso
        exact jojo_not_alive halive
  have h3 : ¬ Dog jojo := by
    intro hdog
    have hbark : Barks jojo := dogs_bark jojo ⟨jojo_pet, hdog⟩
    have hnotdead : ¬ Dead jojo := barking_pet_not_dead jojo ⟨jojo_pet, hbark⟩
    exact hnotdead h2
  have h4 : Cat jojo := by
    cases h1 with
    | inl hcat =>
        exact hcat
    | inr hdog =>
        exfalso
        exact h3 hdog
  have h5 : ¬ Ghost jojo := ghosts_do_not_exist jojo
  exact h5

theorem hypothesis : Cat jojo ∨ Ghost jojo := by

  have h3 : Dead jojo := by

  (Cat Jojo ∨ Ghost Jojo) → (Bark Jojo ∨ Dog Jojo)

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp
  have hDeadOrAlive : Dead Jojo ∨ Alive Jojo := premise5 Jojo premise6_pet
  have hDead : Dead Jojo := by
    cases hDeadOrAlive with
    | inl hd => exact hd
    | inr ha =>

  have hNoGhost : ¬ Ghost Jojo := premise3 Jojo
  have hCatOrDog : Cat Jojo ∨ Dog Jojo := premise1 Jojo premise6_pet
  have hNotDog : ¬ Dog Jojo := by
    intro hDog
    have hBark : Bark Jojo := premise2 Jojo premise6_pet hDog
    have hNotDead : ¬ Dead Jojo := premise4 Jojo premise6_pet hBark
    exact hNotDead hDead
  have hCat : Cat Jojo := by
    cases hCatOrDog with
    | inl hc => exact hc
    | inr hd =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotDog hd
  have hAntecedent : Cat Jojo ∨ Ghost Jojo := Or.inl hCat
  have hConsequent : Bark Jojo ∨ Dog Jojo := hHyp hAntecedent
  have hNotBark : ¬ Bark Jojo := by
    intro hBark
    have hNotDead : ¬ Dead Jojo := premise4 Jojo premise6_pet hBark
    exact hNotDead hDead
  have hFalseConsequent : False := by
    cases hConsequent with
    | inl hb =>

    | inr hd =>
        exact hNotDog hd

axiom Entity : Type

axiom all_huskies_are_dogs : ∀ x : Entity, Husky x → Dog x
axiom fido_either_bengal_tiger_or_cat : BengalTiger Fido ∨ Cat Fido

def Hypothesis : Prop := BengalTiger Fido

theorem reasoning_attempt_unknown :
  (BengalTiger Fido ∨ Cat Fido) →
  ¬ (BengalTiger Fido) ∨ ¬ (¬ BengalTiger Fido) := by
  intro h
  cases h with
  | inl hb =>
      right
      intro hnb
      exact hnb hb
  | inr hc =>
      left
      intro hb
      have ht : Tiger Fido := all_bengal_tigers_are_tigers Fido hb
      have hcat : Cat Fido := all_tigers_are_cats Fido ht
      exact False.elim (by
        have : Cat Fido := hc
        contradiction)

theorem model_reasoning_chain : True := by
  have h1 : BengalTiger Fido ∨ Cat Fido := fido_either_bengal_tiger_or_cat
  have h2 : BengalTiger Fido → Hypothesis := by
    intro hb
    exact hb
  have h3 : Cat Fido → ¬ Hypothesis := by
    intro hc
    intro hb
    have ht : Tiger Fido := all_bengal_tigers_are_tigers Fido hb
    have hcat : Cat Fido := all_tigers_are_cats Fido ht
    exact False.elim (by contradiction)
  have h4 : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
    cases h1 with
    | inl hb =>
        exact Or.inr (h2 hb)
    | inr hc =>
        exact Or.inl (h3 hc)
  trivial

theorem hypothesis_status_indeterminate : True := by
  trivial

theorem hypothesis : ¬ Dog Fido ∧ ¬ Husky Fido := by
  cases fido_bengal_tiger_or_cat with
  | inl h_bengal =>
      have h_tiger : Tiger Fido := all_bengal_tigers_are_tigers Fido h_bengal

      have h_not_dog : ¬ Dog Fido := no_cats_are_dogs Fido h_cat
      have h_not_husky : ¬ Husky Fido := by
        intro h_husky
        have h_dog : Dog Fido := all_huskies_are_dogs Fido h_husky
        exact h_not_dog h_dog
      exact And.intro h_not_dog h_not_husky
  | inr h_cat =>
      have h_not_dog : ¬ Dog Fido := no_cats_are_dogs Fido h_cat
      have h_not_husky : ¬ Husky Fido := by
        intro h_husky

  intro hProstate

    apply premise4 adenocarcinoma

  have hConsequent : women adenocarcinoma ∨ withoutMutations adenocarcinoma := premise6 hAntecedent
  have hWomen : women adenocarcinoma := by
    cases hConsequent with

      exact False.elim (hNoWithout hwm)
  have hNotProstate : ¬ prostateCancer adenocarcinoma := premise2 adenocarcinoma hWomen

  have h2 : Jack ↔ (IronManOn ∧ ¬ WeatherBadToday) := premise2
  have h3 : ∃ d : Day, InMarch d ∧ BadWeather d := premise3
  have h4 : IronManOn := premise4
  have h5 : MarchNow := premise5

    · intro hnw

    · intro hnw
      have hjack : Jack := h6.mpr hnw
      exact h1.mpr hjack
  have h8 : ∃ d : Day, BadWeather d := by
    rcases h3 with ⟨d, hdMarch, hdBad⟩
    exact ⟨d, hdBad⟩
  have h9 : WeatherBadToday ∨ ¬ WeatherBadToday := by

  cases h9 with

      have hnotJohn : ¬ John := by
        intro hjohn
        have hnw : ¬ WeatherBadToday := h7.mp hjohn
        exact hnw hbad
      exact Or.inl hnotJohn
  | inr hgood =>
      have hJohn : John := h7.mpr hgood
      exact Or.inr (Or.inl hJohn)

  ∀ x : CelestialBody, Planet x → ¬ ReliesOnNuclearFusion x

    InSolarSystem x → ClearedOrbit x → NearlySpherical x → Planet x

  ¬ (InSolarSystem Europa ∧ GreaterThanPointZeroEightSolarMasses Europa)

  have h3 : ∀ x : CelestialBody, InSolarSystem x → GreaterThanPointZeroEightSolarMasses x → Star x :=

  have h4 : ∀ x : CelestialBody, InSolarSystem x → ClearedOrbit x → NearlySpherical x → Planet x :=

    have hstar : Star Europa := europa_gt_implies_star hs hm
    have hfusion : ReliesOnNuclearFusion Europa := europa_star_implies_fusion hstar

    exact hnotfusion hfusion

theorem hypothesis : WrittenWithWords AsItWas := by

  have hClassicalOrRap : Classical AsItWas ∨ Rap AsItWas := premise1 hMusic AsItWas premise7

    cases hClassicalOrRap with

  have hXY : EnjoyHealthcareHelpMedicalIssues Mark ∨ GrewUpWithDoctorParents Mark := by

  (NonRareEarth Lithium ∧ EssentialForElectronics Lithium) ∨
  (¬ NonRareEarth Lithium ∧ ¬ EssentialForElectronics Lithium)

theorem hypothesis :
  (¬ EssentialForElectronics Lithium ∨ Atomic61to63 Lithium) →
  (¬ NonRareEarth Lithium ∨ UsableInIndustry Lithium) := by
  intro hAnte
  have hLithiumNREAndEssential : NonRareEarth Lithium ∧ EssentialForElectronics Lithium := by
    cases premise6 with
    | inl h1 =>
        exact h1
    | inr h2 =>
        have hRareEssential : EssentialForElectronics Lithium := by
          have hRare : RareEarth Lithium := by
            have hAll := premise3 Lithium
            cases hAll with

                contradiction
            | inr hre =>
                exact hre
          exact premise5 Lithium hRare
        have hNotEssential : ¬ EssentialForElectronics Lithium := h2.2
        have : False := hNotEssential hRareEssential
        contradiction

  have hLithiumEssential : EssentialForElectronics Lithium := hLithiumNREAndEssential.2
  have h61to63Rare : ∀ x : Element, Atomic61to63 x → RareEarth x := by
    intro x hx
    have hAll := premise3 x
    cases hAll with
    | inl hnre =>
        have hNotScarce : ¬ ScarceInChina x := premise2 x hnre
        have hScarce : ¬ (¬ ScarceInChina x) := premise1 x hx
        have : False := hScarce hNotScarce
        contradiction
    | inr hre =>
        exact hre
  have hLithiumNot61to63 : ¬ Atomic61to63 Lithium := by
    intro hA
    have hRare : RareEarth Lithium := h61to63Rare Lithium hA
    have hAll := premise3 Lithium
    cases hAll with
    | inl hnre =>
        contradiction
    | inr hre =>
        contradiction
  have hAnteFalse : False := by
    cases hAnte with
    | inl hNotEssential =>
        exact hNotEssential hLithiumEssential
    | inr hA =>
        exact hLithiumNot61to63 hA
  have hUsableComment : ¬ NonRareEarth Lithium ∨ UsableInIndustry Lithium := by
    have hNotNotNRE : ¬ ¬ NonRareEarth Lithium := by
      intro hNotNRE
      exact hNotNRE hLithiumNRE
    have hFalseBranch : False := hAnteFalse
    contradiction
  exact hUsableComment

  have h_not_event : ¬ EventRelatedDesign PictureMemory := premise5.2.1

  have h6 : PrecededByDataProcessing PictureMemory := premise3 PictureMemory ⟨h1, h5⟩

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : Easy twoSum → ¬ ACLowerThan20 twoSum := premise1 twoSum
  have h2 : RecommendedToNovices twoSum → Easy twoSum := premise2 twoSum
  have h3 : ACLowerThan20 twoSum ∨ StarredMoreThan1k twoSum := premise3 twoSum
  have h4 : Hard twoSum → StarredMoreThan1k twoSum := premise4 twoSum
  have h5 : PublishedAfter2022 twoSum → ¬ StarredMoreThan1k twoSum := premise5 twoSum
  have h6 : ¬ (Hard twoSum ∧ RecommendedToNovices twoSum) := premise6
  have hEasyStar : Easy twoSum → StarredMoreThan1k twoSum := by
    intro hEasy

    cases h3 with

    exact hNotStar hStar

  trivial

lean_code:
axiom Problem : Type

axiom easy : Problem → Prop
axiom recommended : Problem → Prop
axiom lowAC : Problem → Prop
axiom starred : Problem → Prop
axiom hard : Problem → Prop
axiom publishedAfter2022 : Problem → Prop

axiom twoSum : Problem
axiom fourSum : Problem

axiom premise1 : ∀ x : Problem, easy x → ¬ lowAC x
axiom premise2 : ∀ x : Problem, recommended x → easy x
axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Problem, lowAC x ∨ starred x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Problem, hard x → starred x
axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Problem, publishedAfter2022 x → ¬ starred x
axiom premise6 : ¬ (hard twoSum ∧ recommended twoSum)
axiom premise7 : (starred fourSum ∧ publishedAfter2022 fourSum) ∨
                 (¬ starred fourSum ∧ ¬ publishedAfter2022 fourSum)

theorem hypothesis : ¬ (recommended fourSum ∨ hard fourSum) := by
  have h_neither : ¬ starred fourSum ∧ ¬ publishedAfter2022 fourSum := by
    cases premise7 with
    | inl hboth =>
        have hns : ¬ starred fourSum := premise5 fourSum hboth.right
        exact False.elim (hns hboth.left)
    | inr hneither =>
        exact hneither
  have h_not_starred : ¬ starred fourSum := h_neither.left
  have h_lowAC : lowAC fourSum := by
    have h3 := premise3 fourSum
    cases h3 with
    | inl hlow => exact hlow
    | inr hstar => exact False.elim (h_not_starred hstar)
  have h_not_easy : ¬ easy fourSum := by
    intro heasy
    have hnotlow := premise1 fourSum heasy
    exact hnotlow h_lowAC
  have h_not_recommended : ¬ recommended fourSum := by
    intro hrec
    have heasy := premise2 fourSum hrec
    exact h_not_easy heasy
  have h_not_hard : ¬ hard fourSum := by
    intro hhard
    have hstar := premise4 fourSum hhard
    exact h_not_starred hstar
  intro h
  cases h with
  | inl hrec => exact h_not_recommended hrec
  | inr hhard => exact h_not_hard hhard

axiom premise6 : ¬ (hard twoSum ∧ recommendedToNovices twoSum)
axiom premise7 : (starredOver1k fourSum ∧ publishedAfter2022 fourSum) ∨

axiom fourSum_is_leetcode : leetcode fourSum

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ¬ recommendedToNovices fourSum ∧ ¬ hard fourSum

theorem model_reasoning_chain : Hypothesis := by
  have h7 := premise7
  have hNotStarred : ¬ starredOver1k fourSum := by
    cases h7 with
    | inl h =>
        have hNoStar : ¬ starredOver1k fourSum := premise5 fourSum h.right
        exact hNoStar
    | inr h =>
        exact h.left
  have hAcLow : acLowerThan20 fourSum := by
    have h3 := premise3 fourSum fourSum_is_leetcode
    cases h3 with
    | inl hlow =>
        exact hlow
    | inr hstar =>
        exact False.elim (hNotStarred hstar)
  have hNotEasy : ¬ easy fourSum := by
    intro hEasy
    have hNoLow := premise1 fourSum hEasy
    exact hNoLow hAcLow
  have hNotRecommended : ¬ recommendedToNovices fourSum := by
    intro hRec
    have hEasy := premise2 fourSum hRec
    exact hNotEasy hEasy
  have hNotHard : ¬ hard fourSum := by

    exact hNotStarred hStar
  exact And.intro hNotRecommended hNotHard

premises:
Common utilities include water, electricity, gas, heating, sewer, trash, and recycling.
Many apartment rents cover the cost of water and electricity.
Susan lives in an apartment where the rent covers all utilities.
The rent of the apartment where Ava lives does not cover any utility expenses.
Noah lives in an apartment where the rent does not cover heating.
hypothesis: Noah needs to pay the water bill.
lean_code:
inductive Utility where
  | water
  | electricity
  | gas
  | heating
  | sewer
  | trash
  | recycling
deriving DecidableEq

inductive Person where
  | Susan
  | Ava
  | Noah
deriving DecidableEq

abbrev Covers (rentCovers : Person → Utility → Prop) (p : Person) (u : Utility) : Prop := rentCovers p u
abbrev NeedsToPay (rentCovers : Person → Utility → Prop) (p : Person) (u : Utility) : Prop := ¬ rentCovers p u

structure Premises where
  commonUtilities :
    Covers
  manyApartmentRentsCoverWaterAndElectricity : Prop
  susanAllUtilities : ∀ u : Utility, Covers
  avaNoUtilities : ∀ u : Utility, ¬ Covers
  noahNoHeating : ¬ Covers

namespace Evaluation

variable {rentCovers : Person → Utility → Prop}

def premises : Premises := {
  commonUtilities := rentCovers
  manyApartmentRentsCoverWaterAndElectricity := True
  susanAllUtilities := by
    intro u
    sorry
  avaNoUtilities := by
    intro u
    sorry
  noahNoHeating := by
    sorry
}

def Hypothesis : Prop := NeedsToPay rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.water

theorem reasoning_attempt (P : Premises) : True := by
  have h1 : ¬ Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.heating := P.noahNoHeating
  have h2 : P.manyApartmentRentsCoverWaterAndElectricity := P.manyApartmentRentsCoverWaterAndElectricity
  have h3 : Covers rentCovers Person.Susan Utility.water := P.susanAllUtilities Utility.water
  have h4 : ¬ Covers rentCovers Person.Ava Utility.water := P.avaNoUtilities Utility.water
  have h5 : ¬ Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.water ∨ Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.water := by
    by_cases hw : Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.water
    · exact Or.inr hw
    · exact Or.inl hw
  have h6 : ¬ Hypothesis ∨ Hypothesis := by
    by_cases hh : Hypothesis
    · exact Or.inr hh
    · exact Or.inl hh
  trivial

theorem conclusion_unknown (P : Premises) : True := by
  have h1 : ¬ Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.heating := P.noahNoHeating
  have h2 : True := by trivial
  have h3 : ¬ Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.water ∨ Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.water := by
    by_cases hw : Covers rentCovers Person.Noah Utility.water
    · exact Or.inr hw
    · exact Or.inl hw
  trivial

end Evaluation

  · have hNoahNotCovered : ¬ RentCovers Noah heating := premise5
