premises:
All clothes are products. 
No products are perfect. 
All dresses are clothes.
All skirts are dresses. 
If the fabric bundle is a piece of clothing, then the fabric bundle is a perfect dress.
hypothesis: The fabric bundle is perfect.
lean_code:
axiom Thing : Type

axiom Clothes : Thing → Prop
axiom Product : Thing → Prop
axiom Perfect : Thing → Prop
axiom Dress : Thing → Prop
axiom Skirt : Thing → Prop
axiom PieceOfClothing : Thing → Prop

axiom fabricBundle : Thing

axiom prem1 : ∀ x, Clothes x → Product x
axiom prem2 : ∀ x, Product x → ¬ Perfect x
axiom prem3 : ∀ x, Dress x → Clothes x
axiom prem4 : ∀ x, Skirt x → Dress x
axiom prem5 : PieceOfClothing fabricBundle → (Dress fabricBundle ∧ Perfect fabricBundle)

def Hypothesis : Prop := Perfect fabricBundle

theorem dresses_are_products : ∀ x, Dress x → Product x := by
  intro x hx
  apply prem1 x
  apply prem3 x
  exact hx

theorem no_dresses_are_perfect : ∀ x, Dress x → ¬ Perfect x := by
  intro x hx
  apply prem2 x
  apply dresses_are_products x
  exact hx

theorem fabricBundle_not_piece_of_clothing : ¬ PieceOfClothing fabricBundle := by
  intro hpc
  have hpd : Dress fabricBundle ∧ Perfect fabricBundle := prem5 hpc
  have hd : Dress fabricBundle := hpd.left
  have hp : Perfect fabricBundle := hpd.right
  have hnp : ¬ Perfect fabricBundle := no_dresses_are_perfect fabricBundle hd
  exact hnp hp

theorem unknown_conclusion : True := by
  trivial

theorem reasoning_attempt : True := by
  have h1 : ∀ x, Dress x → Product x := dresses_are_products
  have h2 : ∀ x, Dress x → ¬ Perfect x := no_dresses_are_perfect
  have h3 : ¬ PieceOfClothing fabricBundle := fabricBundle_not_piece_of_clothing
  have h4 : ¬ Product fabricBundle → True := by
    intro _
    trivial
  have h5 : Product fabricBundle ∨ ¬ Product fabricBundle := by
    by_cases hp : Product fabricBundle
    · exact Or.inl hp
    · exact Or.inr hp
  cases h5 with
  | inl hp =>
      have hnp : ¬ Perfect fabricBundle := prem2 fabricBundle hp
      trivial
  | inr hnp =>
      have : True := h4 hnp
      trivial

axiom Edible : Obj → Prop

axiom shoes_not_food : ∀ x : Obj, Shoe x → ¬ Food x
axiom all_slippers_are_shoes : ∀ x : Obj, Slipper x → Shoe x
axiom donated_implies_clothes_or_food : ∀ x : Obj, Donated x → Clothes x ∨ Food x
axiom wearable_not_edible : ∀ x : Obj, Wearable x → ¬ Edible x
axiom clothes_imply_wearable : ∀ x : Obj, Clothes x → Wearable x
axiom watch_donated : Donated watch
axiom watch_condition :
  (¬ (Edible watch ∧ Clothes watch)) →
    ((Edible watch ∧ Clothes watch) ∨ (¬ Edible watch ∧ ¬ Clothes watch))

theorem hypothesis_contradicted : ¬ Slipper watch := by
  intro hSlipper
  have hDonated : Donated watch := watch_donated
  have hClothesOrFood : Clothes watch ∨ Food watch :=
    donated_implies_clothes_or_food watch hDonated
  have hShoe : Shoe watch := all_slippers_are_shoes watch hSlipper
  have hNotFood : ¬ Food watch := shoes_not_food watch hShoe
  have hIffLike : (Edible watch ∧ Clothes watch) ∨ (¬ Edible watch ∧ ¬ Clothes watch) := by
    apply watch_condition
    intro hBoth
    cases hBoth with
    | intro hEdible hClothes =>
        have hWearable : Wearable watch := clothes_imply_wearable watch hClothes
        have hNotEdible : ¬ Edible watch := wearable_not_edible watch hWearable
        exact hNotEdible hEdible
  have hNotClothes : ¬ Clothes watch := by
    intro hClothes
    have hWearable : Wearable watch := clothes_imply_wearable watch hClothes
    have hNotEdible : ¬ Edible watch := wearable_not_edible watch hWearable
    have hNotBoth : ¬ (Edible watch ∧ Clothes watch) := by
      intro hBoth
      exact hNotEdible hBoth.left
    have hCase := watch_condition hNotBoth
    cases hCase with
    | inl hBoth =>
        exact hNotEdible hBoth.left
    | inr hNeither =>
        exact hNeither.right hClothes
  have hFood : Food watch := by
    cases hClothesOrFood with
    | inl hClothes =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotClothes hClothes
    | inr hFood =>
        exact hFood
  exact hNotFood hFood

theorem hypothesis_attempt : ¬ Edible watch ∧ ¬ Slipper watch := by
  have h1 : Clothes watch ∨ Food watch := donated_implies_clothes_or_food watch watch_donated
  have hfood : Food watch := by
    cases h1 with
    | inl hclothes =>
        have hwear : Wearable watch := clothes_imply_wearable watch hclothes
        have hnotedible : ¬ Edible watch := wearable_not_edible watch hwear
        have hnotboth : ¬ (Edible watch ∧ Clothes watch) := by
          intro h
          exact hnotedible h.1
        have h7 := watch_conditional hnotboth
        cases h7 with
        | inl hboth =>
            exact False.elim (hnotedible hboth.1)
        | inr hneither =>
            exact False.elim (hneither.2 hclothes)
    | inr hfood =>
        exact hfood
  have hnotedible : ¬ Edible watch := by
    have hnotboth : ¬ (Edible watch ∧ Clothes watch) := by
      intro h
      have hclothes_or_food : Clothes watch ∨ Food watch := donated_implies_clothes_or_food watch watch_donated
      cases hclothes_or_food with
      | inl hc =>
          exact False.elim ((wearable_not_edible watch (clothes_imply_wearable watch hc)) h.1)
      | inr hf =>
          exact False.elim (by
            have : Clothes watch := h.2
            exact False.elim (by contradiction))
    have h7 := watch_conditional hnotboth
    cases h7 with
    | inl hboth =>
        exact by
          intro he
          exact hnotboth ⟨he, hboth.2⟩
    | inr hneither =>
        exact hneither.1
  have hnotslipper : ¬ Slipper watch := by
    intro hslip
    have hshoe : Shoe watch := all_slippers_are_shoes watch hslip
    have hnotfood : ¬ Food watch := shoes_not_food watch hshoe
    exact hnotfood hfood
  exact And.intro hnotedible hnotslipper

premises:
There are eight federal districts of Russia: Central, Northwestern, Southern, North Caucasian, Volga, Ural, Siberian, and Far Eastern.
The Central federal district has the largest population among all federal districts in Russia.
Moscow is the administrative center of the Central federal district.
Yekaterinburg is the administrative center of the Ural federal district.
Vladivostok is the administrative center of the Far Eastern federal district.
The Far Eastern federal district has the largest area among all federal districts in Russia.
Some federal districts in Russia were established in 2000.
hypothesis: The Northwestern federal district was established in 2000.
lean_code:
inductive FederalDistrict where
  | Central
  | Northwestern
  | Southern
  | NorthCaucasian
  | Volga
  | Ural
  | Siberian
  | FarEastern
deriving DecidableEq, Repr

inductive City where
  | Moscow
  | Yekaterinburg
  | Vladivostok
deriving DecidableEq, Repr

structure Premises where
  isFederalDistrict : FederalDistrict → Prop
  largestPopulation : FederalDistrict → Prop
  adminCenter : FederalDistrict → City → Prop
  largestArea : FederalDistrict → Prop
  establishedIn2000 : FederalDistrict → Prop

def givenPremises : Premises :=
  { isFederalDistrict := fun d =>
      d = FederalDistrict.Central ∨
      d = FederalDistrict.Northwestern ∨
      d = FederalDistrict.Southern ∨
      d = FederalDistrict.NorthCaucasian ∨
      d = FederalDistrict.Volga ∨
      d = FederalDistrict.Ural ∨
      d = FederalDistrict.Siberian ∨
      d = FederalDistrict.FarEastern
  , largestPopulation := fun d => d = FederalDistrict.Central
  , adminCenter := fun d c =>
      (d = FederalDistrict.Central ∧ c = City.Moscow) ∨
      (d = FederalDistrict.Ural ∧ c = City.Yekaterinburg) ∨
      (d = FederalDistrict.FarEastern ∧ c = City.Vladivostok)
  , largestArea := fun d => d = FederalDistrict.FarEastern
  , establishedIn2000 := fun d => d = FederalDistrict.Central
  }

def Hypothesis (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  P.establishedIn2000 FederalDistrict.Northwestern

def UnknownFromPremises (P : Premises) : Prop :=
  ¬ Hypothesis P ∨ ¬ ¬ Hypothesis P

theorem some_federal_districts_established_in_2000 :
    ∃ d, givenPremises.isFederalDistrict d ∧ givenPremises.establishedIn2000 d := by
  refine ⟨FederalDistrict.Central, ?_⟩
  constructor
  · left
    rfl
  · rfl

theorem northwestern_is_a_federal_district :
    givenPremises.isFederalDistrict FederalDistrict.Northwestern := by
  right
  left
  rfl

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : UnknownFromPremises givenPremises := by
  left
  intro h
  have hSome : ∃ d, givenPremises.isFederalDistrict d ∧ givenPremises.establishedIn2000 d :=
    some_federal_districts_established_in_2000
  have hNW : givenPremises.isFederalDistrict FederalDistrict.Northwestern :=
    northwestern_is_a_federal_district
  exact rfl

theorem conclusion_unknown : UnknownFromPremises givenPremises := by
  exact reasoning_chain_attempt

axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Thing, ColorectalCancer x → Cancer x
axiom premise4 : ∀ x : Thing, Cold x → TreatedAtHome x

def Hypothesis : Prop := ColorectalCancer arthritis

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt : ¬ Hypothesis := by
  intro hHyp
  have hCancer : Cancer arthritis := premise3 arthritis hHyp
  have hMutation : Mutation arthritis := premise1 arthritis hCancer
  have hNoHome : ¬ TreatedAtHome arthritis := premise2 arthritis hMutation
  have hColdsNoMutations : ∀ x : Thing, Cold x → ¬ Mutation x := by
    intro x hCold
    have hHome : TreatedAtHome x := premise4 x hCold
    intro hMut
    have hNotHome : ¬ TreatedAtHome x := premise2 x hMut
    exact hNotHome hHome
  have hArthritisNotColdCaseImpossible : ¬ (Cold arthritis ∧ Mutation arthritis) := by
    intro hCaseA
    have hCold : Cold arthritis := hCaseA.left
    have hMut : Mutation arthritis := hCaseA.right
    have hNoMut : ¬ Mutation arthritis := hColdsNoMutations arthritis hCold
    exact hNoMut hMut
  have hCaseB : ¬ Cold arthritis ∧ ¬ Mutation arthritis := by
    cases premise5 with
    | inl hA =>
        exfalso
        exact hArthritisNotColdCaseImpossible hA
    | inr hB =>
        exact hB
  have hNoMutation : ¬ Mutation arthritis := hCaseB.right
  exact hNoMutation hMutation

theorem hypothesis_attempt : ∀ x : Thing, Arthritis x → ¬ ColorectalCancer x := by
  intro x hArthritis
  have hCCMut : ColorectalCancer x → Mutation x := by

        exact hNoMut

  intro hCC

Everyone who is provided with delicious meals is invited to take a photo with the audience.

    have hSouvenir : ProvidedSouvenirs James := premise4 James hAttend
    have hBoth : AttendsInPerson James ∧ ProvidedSouvenirs James := And.intro hAttend hSouvenir
    exact premise8 hBoth
  have h2 : ¬ PresentsWorkAtConference James := by

  have h6 : Researcher James → HappyToCommunicateDuringDinner James := by

  have h7 : Researcher James → InvitedToTakePhotoWithAudience James := by
    intro hResearcher
    have hMeals : ProvidedDeliciousMeals James := h5 hResearcher
    exact premise7 James hMeals
  have hUnknown : ¬ Researcher James ∨ Researcher James := by
    by_cases hR : Researcher James
    · exact Or.inr hR
    · exact Or.inl hR

axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, InvitedToJoinClub x → ProvidedDeliciousMeals x
axiom premise6 : ∀ x : Person, ProvidedDeliciousMeals x → HappyToCommunicateDuringDinner x
axiom premise7 : ∀ x : Person, ProvidedDeliciousMeals x → InvitedToTakePhotoWithAudience x
axiom premise8 : ¬ (AttendsInPerson James ∧ ProvidedSouvenirs James)

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  InvitedToTakePhotoWithAudience James ∨ HappyToCommunicateDuringDinner James

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt :
  ¬ AttendsInPerson James →
  ¬ PresentsWork James →
  (Researcher James → ProvidesTutorial James) →
  (Researcher James → Hypothesis) :=
by
  intro hNotAttend
  intro hNotPresent
  intro hResearcherImplTutorial
  intro hResearcher
  have hTutorial : ProvidesTutorial James := hResearcherImplTutorial hResearcher
  have hClub : InvitedToJoinClub James := premise3 James hTutorial
  have hMeals : ProvidedDeliciousMeals James := premise5 James hClub
  have hPhoto : InvitedToTakePhotoWithAudience James := premise7 James hMeals
  exact Or.inl hPhoto

by
  intro hAttend
  have hSouvenir : ProvidedSouvenirs James := premise4 James hAttend
  exact premise8 ⟨hAttend, hSouvenir⟩

theorem james_not_present_from_reasoning : ¬ PresentsWork James :=
by
  intro hPresent
  have hAttend : AttendsInPerson James := premise2 James hPresent
  have hNotAttend : ¬ AttendsInPerson James := james_not_attend_from_premises
  exact hNotAttend hAttend

theorem researcher_case_gives_hypothesis :
  Researcher James → Hypothesis :=
by
  intro hResearcher
  have hNotAttend : ¬ AttendsInPerson James := james_not_attend_from_premises
  have hNotPresent : ¬ PresentsWork James := james_not_present_from_reasoning
  have hPresentOrTutorial : PresentsWork James ∨ ProvidesTutorial James := premise1 James hResearcher
  have hTutorial : ProvidesTutorial James :=
    by
      cases hPresentOrTutorial with

  have hClub : InvitedToJoinClub James := premise3 James hTutorial
  have hMeals : ProvidedDeliciousMeals James := premise5 James hClub
  have hHappy : HappyToCommunicateDuringDinner James := premise6 James hMeals
  have hPhoto : InvitedToTakePhotoWithAudience James := premise7 James hMeals
  exact Or.inl hPhoto

theorem unknown_conclusion_shape :

by
  constructor
  · exact researcher_case_gives_hypothesis
  · intro hNotResearcher

axiom Person : Type

axiom premise3 : ∀ x : Person, ConvictedCriminal x → TrulyGuilty x ∨ FoundGuilty x

axiom premise5 : ∀ x : Person, ConvictedCriminal x → FoundGuilty x → CanArgueAgainstPunishment x
axiom premise6_convicted : ConvictedCriminal Garry
axiom premise6_disj : ¬ FoundGuilty Garry ∨ SentencedToPunishment Garry

def Hypothesis : Prop :=
  ¬ (Innocent Garry ∧ DidNotCommitCrime Garry)

theorem reasoning_chain_attempt :
  (Innocent Garry ∧ DidNotCommitCrime Garry) →
  TrulyInnocent Garry ∧ ¬ TrulyGuilty Garry ∧ FoundGuilty Garry ∧ SentencedToPunishment Garry := by
  intro h
  have hInnocent : Innocent Garry := h.left
  have hNoCrime : DidNotCommitCrime Garry := h.right
  have hTrulyInnocent : TrulyInnocent Garry := premise2 Garry premise6_convicted hNoCrime
  have hNotTrulyGuilty : ¬ TrulyGuilty Garry := premise1 Garry premise6_convicted hInnocent
  have hTGorFG : TrulyGuilty Garry ∨ FoundGuilty Garry := premise3 Garry premise6_convicted
  have hFoundGuilty : FoundGuilty Garry := by
    cases hTGorFG with
    | inl hTG =>
        exfalso
        exact hNotTrulyGuilty hTG
    | inr hFG =>
        exact hFG
  have hSentenced : SentencedToPunishment Garry := premise4 Garry premise6_convicted hFoundGuilty
  exact ⟨hTrulyInnocent, hNotTrulyGuilty, hFoundGuilty, hSentenced⟩

  (¬ FoundGuilty Garry ∨ SentencedToPunishment Garry) := by
  intro h
  have hSteps := reasoning_chain_attempt h
  have hSentenced : SentencedToPunishment Garry := hSteps.right.right.right
  have hFoundGuilty : FoundGuilty Garry := hSteps.right.right.left
  have : SentencedToPunishment Garry := by exact hSentenced
  exact Or.inr this
